title: WEEKEND YOUTUBE REAL ESTATE VIDEO EDITOR [ONE SPOT LEFT]
description:

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We are two Filipino Entrepreneurs looking for additional creative video editors for our YouTube Media Marketing Company (Real Estate Niche). We work with over 10 Real Estate clients and manage over a dozen channels all over the United States. The culture that we've built within our team is like a family. We are all Filipino and can understand Tagalog and Bisaya but prefer English. 



Currently, we have an expert media department that has been with us long term. We're starting to gain 
ntum as a company and get new clients at a fast rate, so right now, we're hiring both contractors (Per Job Basis) and Potential full-time editors to add to our amazing media team.

dia

title: Blog Writer and Pinterest Copywriter for Gift Guide Website
description:
Hi! I'm Mimi, and I run a growing gift guide website that helps people find thoughtful, unique gifts for every occasion. I'm looking for a talented writer to join our small team and help bring this site to life with high-quality gift guide articles and Pinterest copy.



What you'll be doing:

Writing complete gift guide articles (think "Best Gifts for Beach Lovers" or "Unique White Elephant Gifts Under $30") from research through final draft. This includes finding and curating the best products for each guide, writing engaging product descriptions and article copy, writing Pinterest pin titles and descriptions optimized for search, and basic on-page SEO (keywords, meta descriptions, headings).



All content is ghostwritten under the brand's voice and style. You'll be working from article briefs and following our style guide, but I'm looking for someone who can own the full writing process and deliver articles that need only light editing from me before publishing.



You'd be a great fit if you:

Have strong English writing skills with a warm, conversational tone (think talking to a friend, not writing a textbook). Have experience writing product roundups, gift guides, or affiliate content. Understand basic SEO and know how to naturally work keywords into content. Are comfortable doing product research across sites like Amazon, Etsy, and brand websites. Have some familiarity with Pinterest SEO and writing pin descriptions that rank. Are detail-oriented and can follow a style guide consistently. Can work independently and meet deadlines without a lot of hand-holding.



Bonus points if you:

Have experience with WordPress. Have written for lifestyle, gift, or shopping content sites before. Are genuinely interested in gift-giving and love finding cool products.



Benefits and details:

Looking for someone who can work full-time hours. The start date is as soon as possible. You'll get paid with PayPal. The training period is 10 work days. This is your trial period. You'll get 50% pay on day 1 and 50% on day 10. After day 10, you'll be paid once a month. 13th month pay (prorated for your first year). 2 weeks of paid time off per calendar year. 2 weeks of unpaid time off. Time off and paid for all national holidays.



Do you want to work from home with flexible hours? Are you a strong writer who loves finding the perfect gift for people? Do you want a steady role with a small, growing team?



If that sounds like you, apply via this form and tell me what the last great gift you gave someone was (and why you picked it): 



Applications directly via OnlineJobs are ignored.



Thanks so much!

Mimi

California, USA

title: Growth Content & UGC Manager (AI-Powered Social + Video)
description:
About Us

MyBellaBaby is a fast-growing Canadian baby brand providing free baby samples and weekly giveaways to expecting and new parents.



We are scaling our organic and paid content and need a Growth Content Manager who can oversee:



• AI-assisted content creation

• Daily social media posting

• UGC sourcing & coordination

• Short-form video production

• Repurposing long-form content

• Performance-driven iteration



This is not just a posting role.



This is a growth-focused position.



Role Overview

You will manage and execute our entire content engine across:



• TikTok

• Instagram

•

• YouTube (Shorts + Long Form)



You will use AI tools, editing software, and performance insights to produce high-quality content consistently (2–3 posts per day across platforms).



The goal is growth, engagement, and lead generation.



Core Responsibilities

1?? AI Content Creation & Scheduling

• Generate 60–90 posts per month using AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.)

• Create captions, hooks, and CTA variations

• Design simple branded graphics in Canva

• Upload and schedule via Metricool (or similar platform)

• Ensure content aligns with monthly strategy themes



2?? Video Production & Repurposing

• Produce 10–20 short-form videos per month

• Edit UGC clips into high-performing ad-style videos

• Repurpose long-form YouTube content into multiple shorts

• Add captions and motion text

• Deliver optimized formats (9:16, 16:9, etc.)



3?? UGC Management

• Identify and coordinate micro-influencers or moms

• Provide them with creative briefs

• Collect and organize raw footage

• Edit UGC into ads and organic posts

• Manage simple release permissions



4?? Performance & Optimization

• Review weekly performance metrics

• Identify top-performing hooks and themes

• Create variations of winning content

• Provide short weekly reports with insights

• Suggest new creative angles monthly



Required Skills

• 3+ years experience managing social media growth

• Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, Final Cut, Descript)

• Experience using AI tools for content creation

• Understanding of paid social ad creative

• Experience repurposing content efficiently

• Ability to manage UGC creators

• Strong English writing skills

• Organized and deadline-driven



Tools We Expect You to Be Comfortable With

• ChatGPT

• Canva Pro

• CapCut / Premiere / Descript

• ElevenLabs (optional)

• Metricool / Buffer / similar scheduler

• Google Drive

• Basic analytics review (Meta / TikTok / YouTube dashboards)



Deliverables (Monthly)

• 60+ scheduled posts across platforms

• 10–20 short-form videos

• 2–4 longer informational YouTube videos

• 8–12 UGC-based testimonial clips

• Organized content calendar

• Weekly performance summary



Success Metrics

• Increased engagement rate

• Increased video retention

• Increased click-through to landing page

• Lower cost per lead (for paid creatives)

• Consistent content output without founder involvement



Compensation based on skill level and output.



How to Apply

Please include:



Portfolio links (social accounts or videos managed)

Tools you use and your workflow

Experience with UGC coordination

Example of a 15-second hook idea for Canadian moms promoting a free baby box

Monthly compensation expectation

Availability (hours per week + timezone)

Applications without portfolio examples will not be reviewed.



Hiring Process

• Shortlist review

• Paid test project

• 30-day trial

• Ongoing contract

title: Virtual Assistant - Outbound Calling & Lead Generation (Courier Industry)
description:
About Us:



We are a growing courier and logistics company based in the United States, specializing in auto parts delivery and medical courier services. Our mission is to help local businesses save time, increase efficiency, and improve daily operations through reliable same-day delivery solutions.



We are looking for a motivated and reliable Virtual Assistant to help us grow by reaching out to potential clients and generating new business opportunities.



Position Overview:



We are seeking a part-time Virtual Assistant with experience in cold calling, lead generation, and B2B outreach. This role focuses on contacting auto repair shops, parts distributors, medical facilities, and courier-related businesses to introduce our services and generate interest.



Work Schedule:

 • Part-Time (20–30 hours/week)

 • Must be available during:

8:00 AM – 3:00 PM EST (U.S. Time)

(This will typically be evening/night hours in the Philippines)



Key Responsibilities:

 • Make outbound calls to:

 • Auto repair shops

 • Parts suppliers/distributors

 • Medical facilities (labs, pharmacies, clinics)

 • Introduce our courier services using a provided script

 • Ask qualifying questions and identify potential clients

 • Record call results and notes in Google Sheets or CRM

 • Follow up with leads when needed

 • Set up potential opportunities for the business owner

 • Maintain a professional and friendly tone on all calls



Requirements:

 • Proven experience in:

 • Cold calling / telemarketing

 • Appointment setting or lead generation

 • Strong English communication skills (clear speaking required)

 • Comfortable speaking with business owners and decision-makers

 • Ability to follow scripts but also sound natural

 • Organized and detail-oriented

 • Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace





Preferred (BUT NOT REQUIRED):

 • Experience with:

 • Auto industry (auto shops, parts delivery, etc.)

 • Medical courier or healthcare-related services

 • Familiarity with Google Sheets, CRMs, or call tracking tools



Compensation:

 • Hourly pay (based on experience)

 • Performance bonuses available for:

 • Qualified leads

 • Booked opportunities

 • Closed clients



Please submit:

 1. Your resume

 2. A short message explaining your experience with cold calling or lead generation

 3. A 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself and explaining your experience



Important:



We are looking for someone who is:

? Reliable

? Consistent

? Comfortable on the phone

? Ready to grow with a business long-term

title: E-Commerce Inventory & Production Manager (Shopify)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE





We are a fast-growing, multi-million dollar women’s fashion brand looking for an experienced Inventory & Production Manager to take ownership of our inventory forecasting, restocks, and production coordination.







This role is critical to the business. You will be responsible for ensuring our top-selling products stay in stock, production runs smoothly, and inventory decisions are made based on data — not guesswork.







This role requires someone who can independently manage inventory forecasting and production timelines. This is not a training role.



COMPENSATION





• Starting at $1,800/month (full-time)



• Opportunity for growth based on performance



• Long-term role with a growing global brand



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES





• Manage inventory forecasting using Inventory Planner (or similar tools)



• Monitor sell-through rates and product performance weekly



• Identify restock needs BEFORE products sell out







• Create and manage purchase orders with manufacturers (China & Turkey)



• Confirm ALL production orders before opening any pre-orders



• Track production timelines and follow up with suppliers consistently







• Ensure accurate ETAs are communicated internally



• Prevent overselling or selling inventory that has not been confirmed







• Generate weekly top-seller reports for the marketing and ads team



• Clearly communicate which products should be prioritized for scaling







• Upload and manage products in Shopify including:



– Inventory quantities



– Product naming



– SEO-friendly product descriptions







• Maintain a clean, accurate, and organized Shopify backend



REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)





• Proven experience managing inventory for an e-commerce brand



• Strong understanding of inventory forecasting and sell-through analysis



• Experience using Inventory Planner or similar forecasting tools







• Experience working with overseas manufacturers and production timelines



• Strong understanding of Shopify backend







• Ability to work independently and make data-driven decisions



• High attention to detail with minimal errors



• Strong communication and follow-up skills



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT





• This is not an assistant position



• This is not a beginner role



• This is not a “learn as you go” position







You are expected to take ownership of this function and execute with accuracy.



SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE LOOKS LIKE





• Top-selling products remain in stock



• Restocks are planned proactively (not reactively)



• No pre-orders are opened without confirmed production



• Production timelines are tracked and communicated clearly



• Shopify backend is accurate and well-managed



• Weekly reports directly support sales growth





APPLICATION QUESTIONS (REQUIRED) Please submit answers together with your updated resume at 





Please answer the following:



How do you determine when a product needs to be restocked?

What data or metrics do you use to forecast inventory demand?

Have you used Inventory Planner or a similar tool? Explain how.

How do you prevent stockouts on top-selling products?

Describe your experience working with overseas manufacturers.

What steps do you take before opening a product for pre-order?



FINAL NOTE





We are looking for someone reliable, proactive, and experienced. If you are someone who needs constant direction or training, this role is not the right fit.

title: Virtual Assistant – Bookkeeping & Tax Preparation Support (Mixed Income)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with bookkeeping experience to help organize 3–5 years of financial records across multiple income sources. The goal is to get everything clean and ready for a CPA to file back tax returns. This is a project-based role with the potential for ongoing work.

Income Sources You’ll Be Working With

 ? W-2 Employment – Contract Scrum Master role (employer-issued wages)

 ? LLC Income – Hairstylist business (self-employed business income, possible business expenses/deductions)

 ? Gig/Delivery Apps – DoorDash, Instacart, Uber Eats, or similar platforms (1099-NEC or platform earnings summaries)

 ? Customer Service Work – Additional contract or freelance income

What You’ll Be Doing

 ? Gathering and organizing income records across all four income types for 3–5 tax years

 ? Categorizing business expenses for the LLC (supplies, chair rental, products, mileage, etc.)

 ? Tracking mileage and delivery-related expenses for gig platform work

 ? Reconciling income from W-2s, 1099s, and gig platform payout reports

 ? Building a clean year-by-year income and expense summary ready for a CPA

 ? Flagging any missing documents, gaps, or inconsistencies and communicating them clearly

What We’re Looking For

 ? Experience bookkeeping for individuals with mixed or self-employed income (W-2 + 1099 + LLC)

 ? Familiarity with US tax concepts: W-2s, 1099-NECs, Schedule C, self-employment tax

 ? Experience with gig platform income (DoorDash, Uber, Instacart, etc.) is a strong plus

 ? Proficient in QuickBooks, Wave, FreshBooks, or Excel/Google Sheets

 ? Strong attention to detail — able to spot duplicate entries, missing months, or mismatched totals

 ? Excellent written English communication

 ? Reliable and trustworthy with sensitive financial data

 ? Experience supporting US-based clients preferred

Project Scope

 ? Duration: Project-based (estimated 4-8 weeks depending on volume of records)

 ? Hours: Flexible, approximately 10–20 hours/week

 ? Time Zone: Flexible, but must be available for check-ins during US business hours

How to Apply

Please send the following:

 1. A brief introduction and your bookkeeping background

 2. Specific experience with mixed-income clients (W-2 + self-employed + gig work)

 3. Your preferred tools/software

 4. Your availability and hourly rate

title: AI-First Customer Service Specialist (E-commerce)
description:
Contract type: Freelance / Part-time — potential to grow to full-time

Hours per week: 15–25 hrs to start

Location: Remote

Start date: ASAP





About this role

We're a fast-growing direct-to-consumer e-commerce brand looking for one sharp person to take full ownership of our customer service — built on AI.



We're moving away from an external CS agency and rebuilding our support operation around Minimal AI, an AI customer support platform that automates 90%+ of tickets. Your job is to make that system work as well as possible — and handle the small percentage of cases it can't.



This is not a traditional CS role. You won't be answering tickets all day. You'll be training the AI, improving its responses, and only stepping in when real human judgment is needed.





What you'll do

Training & improving the AI (80% of your time)

• Review AI-generated ticket responses and flag what's wrong, incomplete, or off-brand

• Give structured feedback to the Minimal AI Manager so it learns and improves

• Write and update the protocols the AI follows — return policies, edge cases, tone of voice

• Identify patterns: when the AI keeps getting something wrong, you fix the root cause

• Expand AI coverage over time — the goal is 90%+ resolution rate, you own that number





Handling what the AI can't (20% of your time)

• Complex complaints that need real judgment, not a script

• Sensitive situations where the customer relationship is at stake

• Escalations, high-value orders, or cases that need a personal response





Reporting

• Post a short daily summary in Slack: volume, AI resolution rate, anything notable

• Track KPIs weekly and update our tracker — no chasing required, you just do it

• Flag recurring issues or product complaints to the founders





Requirements

• Hands-on experience with AI tools in a professional setting — not just personal use

• Background in e-commerce customer service for brands doing over 5M annual revenue — you know what good looks like

• You understand that giving AI structured, specific feedback is a skill — and you have it

• Strong written English — you'll be communicating with customers and writing AI protocols.

• Self-directed — you don't need to be managed day-to-day.





Nice to have

• Experience with Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar helpdesk tools

• Shopify knowledge — order flows, refunds, fulfilment logic

• You've trained or fine-tuned an AI tool in a structured way before

• DTC brand experience





KPIs you'll own

• AI Resolution Rate — target 85%+ within 60 days, 90%+ within 90 days

• First Response Time — under 2 hours for human-handled tickets

• CSAT Score — above 4.2 / 5.0

• Refund Rate — under 5%, flag if trending up



One thing to know upfront

This role will look different in 12 months. As the AI gets smarter, the manual volume drops. Your job evolves from doing to managing and improving the system.

If that sounds like a problem, this isn't the right fit. If that sounds interesting, apply.

title: Short Form Video Clipper for Horror YouTube Channel
description:
Hi I'm Kat! I run a YouTube channel called Kat Watches Horror Movies where I watch scary films and scream my way through them. I have 116K+ subscribers, over 1.2 million views in the last 90 days, and a growing audience who genuinely love the chaotic energy of watching someone react to their favourite movies and get scared. I'm building out my online presence and I need help! I'm looking to hire 2–3 dedicated clippers to take my long-form YouTube videos and turn them into short, punchy, scroll-stopping clips for YouTube shorts, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and X.



Your Role:

- Watch my YouTube videos (full reactions are usually 30–50 min) and find the BEST moments-- big scares, funny reactions, dramatic commentary, chaotic energy, then edit them into 30–90 second vertical reels (9:16 format) with captions and clean cuts.

- Deliver 5–10 clips per week, ready to post 

- Match the vibe of my channel, lots of clips already up on YouTube so you can get a sense. 



Looking for someone who:

- Is experienced with short-form video editing. 

- Is great at adding captions (accurate, readable)

- Understands what makes a clip go viral (pacing, hooks, the right moment to cut)

- Reliable and communicative!

- Can turn out 5-10 videos per week



NO AI CLIPPING! THAT'S WHY I'M HERE! I already have Opus AI and have tried a bunch of these platforms already. At this point I can spot an AI clip a mile away!



MAJOR BONUS POINTS if you like/understand horror content, and you're funny!!



Please include the following in your application:

- Tell me who you are, your editing experience, and whether you've worked with creators before.

We'll ship our jewelry (and any props you need) directly to you. You'll concept, film, style, edit, and deliver ready-to-post Reels and TikToks, from idea to final cut. No speaking required, all videos use text overlays and carefully selected music.

How to Apply

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist - Non-Profit Home Health Care Agency
description:
MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH US BASED COMPANIES IN WASHINGTON STATE AND/OR CALIFORNIA. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH MEDICARE/MEDICARE, WELLSKY AND WORKDAY. 



Please apply through this form: 



Summary / objective 

The Talent Acquisition Specialist is responsible for driving the recruitment efforts for a home health care agency and recruitment initiatives, ensuring that we attract, engage, and hire top

talent to meet our organization needs. You will manage the end-to-end recruitment process, from 

sourcing and screening candidates to facilitating interviews and extending job offers. Your role will 

involve collaborating closely with hiring managers to understand their staffing requirements, 

developing effective recruitment strategies, and fostering a positive candidate experience. 



Essential functions & responsibilities

• Collaborate with hiring managers to understand specific hiring needs, job requirements, and

qualifications.

• Responsible for creating and managing job postings for open positions.

• Regularly update hiring managers on the recruitment progress, maintaining transparent

communication throughout the process.

• Monitor and assess the performance of job postings and promptly adjust recruitment strategies

as necessary to attract qualified candidates effectively.

• Review resumes, conduct initial screenings, and evaluate candidate’s qualifications to determine

suitability for open positions.

• Coordinate interviews, including phone screens, and virtual hiring events.

• Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the recruitment process. This includes clear

communication, timely feedback, and a smooth onboarding process.

• Extend jobs offers and facilitate the onboarding process through the BambooHR system,

overseeing tasks such as contacting references, E-Verify, scheduling fingerprint appointments

and coordinating TB testing if necessary.

• Ensure all new hire paperwork is completed accurately and properly filed.

• Schedule and facilitate new hire orientations, collaborating with the training team to ensure a

seamless onboarding experience.

• Collect feedback from new hires and hiring managers to assess the effectiveness of the

onboarding process.

• Make recommendations for improvements to enhance the onboarding experience.

• Provide weekly summaries of recruiting activities and progress to Human Resources Director.

• Stay informed of industry trends and best practices in recruitment ensuring compliance with all

relevant laws and regulations governing recruiting and hiring processes

• Provide administrative support to the HR department as needed.

• Contributes to recruiting projects and initiatives.

• Promote the Mission, Vision and Values of the company in all areas of responsibility, and

demonstrate commitment to Culture of Excellence and strategic goals.

• Other duties as assigned.



Required Knowledge, Skills & Abilities

• Understanding of relevant employment laws and regulations, including equal employment

opportunity (EEO) laws, fair hiring practices, and data privacy laws.

• Strong interpersonal and communication skills to effectively communicate with candidates and

hiring managers.

• Ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple job openings simultaneously, and meet deadlines.

• Proficiency in using Workday systems to manage employee data.

• Ability to handle sensitive and confidential information with discretion and maintain

confidentiality at all times.

• Meticulous attention to detail to ensure accuracy in HR documentation, data entry, and

compliance with policies and procedures.

• Ability to remain flexible, positive, collaborative, and enthusiastic to changes, shifting priorities

and new assignments.

• Possess a professional demeanor, demonstrates initiative, and can work independently.



Required Education & Experience

• High school graduate or equivalent.

• 3-5 years of relevant experience in recruitment and onboarding.



Please apply through this form:

title: Social Media Manager — NYC Korean Restaurants | Full-Time Remote
description:
We're 2020 Hindsight Marketing, a NYC-based agency managing social media for 6 Korean restaurants — from high-end speakeasies and upscale dessert boutiques to modern Korean dining. We need a full-time, Philippines-based Social Media Manager who can handle influencer outreach, content creation, and community management across Instagram and TikTok.



What you'll actually do every day:

You'll manage influencer outreach for NYC restaurants — identifying the right influencers, evaluating their audience (not just their follower count), writing personalized DMs, and tracking every interaction across multiple Google Sheets. You'll handle content calendars, community engagement, and review responses across 6 restaurant accounts. You'll create Instagram posters and graphics in Canva and edit short-form video for Reels and TikTok. You'll source trending restaurant content on TikTok and log reference videos for our content pipeline.





The hardest parts of this job:

-Influencer judgment. Our restaurants range from a $1M-renovation dessert boutique on 5th Avenue to an Eater Top 10 speakeasy to a casual Korean pub. The influencer who's perfect for one is completely wrong for another. You need to look at an influencer's content, their audience, their vibe, and know which restaurant they belong with. This requires cultural awareness of the NYC dining scene — not just knowing what Korean food is, but understanding the difference between a premium modern Korean restaurant and a casual KBBQ spot, and why that distinction matters for marketing.



-Design and content quality. NYC's restaurant marketing scene is extremely competitive and constantly evolving. The posters, graphics, and videos you create need to look like they belong on a premium NYC restaurant's feed — not like a generic Canva template. You need a strong visual eye, an understanding of what's trending, and the ability to match your design style to each restaurant's unique brand and positioning.





What we need from you:

-Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or similar — you'll be creating Reels and TikToks)

-Graphic design skills (Canva minimum, Photoshop/Illustrator a plus — you'll be creating posters and social media graphics that need to look premium)

-Strong English writing that sounds natural, not translated (Gen-Z/Millennial American tone)

-Google Sheets proficiency (data entry, filtering, basic formulas — you'll live in spreadsheets)

-Experience managing Instagram and/or TikTok accounts for food, restaurants, or hospitality

-Comfort working through an AI chatbot for daily task management (this is non-negotiable)

-Attention to detail — multiple sheets must be updated in parallel for every influencer action. Miss one update and the entire pipeline breaks.



Schedule & logistics:

Full-time, remote

Working hours: 12:00 PM – 8:00 PM EST (1:00 AM – 9:00 AM Philippines Time)

Daily time tracking via Timeproof is required

You'll work on a dedicated agency MacBook via remote access



Who thrives here:

People who like structure. People who follow instructions precisely and ask questions when something is unclear instead of guessing. People who take pride in doing things right, not just doing things fast. People who can look at a restaurant's Instagram and immediately see what's working and what isn't.



Who does NOT thrive here:

People who treat checklists as checkboxes without doing the actual work. People who mark things "done" when they aren't. People who want creative freedom without oversight. If you need constant hand-holding to start tasks, or if you disappear without communicating, this won't work.



To apply:

Submit your application and we'll send you a short screening form (takes about 10 minutes). Candidates who advance will be invited to a paid video interview and test. We compensate your time for the final evaluation,  we respect the effort!

writing SEO-optimized titles, tags, and product descriptions



We are looking for someone who understands how to create products that people actually want to buy — not just designs that “look nice.”

cryptocurrency communities


 coin culture

crypto communities / social trends

Design original crypto-related apparel graphics and text-based designs that fit our target market.

funny crypto designs

-based designs

Photoshop

Illustrator

Canva

Kittl

or any other tools that help you create high-quality designs efficiently



Important: Designs must still feel original, clean, and commercially usable — not lazy or generic AI outputs.



3) Prepare Print Files for POD



You will create and export print-ready files for use on our print-on-demand partner platform.



This includes:

You should understand how to prepare files for:



t-shirts

hoodies

hats

and other POD accessories

4) Upload Products to POD Platform

This includes:



selecting the correct products

placing artwork properly on each product

generating product variants

selecting colors and sizes

checking design alignment and appearance

ensuring products are ready to sync to our stores

5) Sync Products to Etsy & Shopify



You will help manage the product publishing workflow by syncing products from our POD platform into our online stores.



This includes:



syncing to Etsy

syncing to Shopify

organizing listings

making sure listings are complete and accurate

checking that images, titles, variants, and pricing are correct

6) Create Product Mockups & Videos



You will create strong product visuals that help products convert.



This includes:



product mockup images

lifestyle mockups

clean e-commerce product images

short product videos / mockup videos when possible



We want visuals that are:



clean

modern

eye-catching

optimized for Etsy / Shopify / ads / social media

7) Write SEO Titles, Descriptions & Tags



You will write SEO-optimized listing content for each product.



This includes:



product titles

product descriptions

Etsy tags / keywords

Shopify product copy

You should understand how to write listings that help products rank and convert.



Examples of what we want:



keyword-rich but natural titles

strong keyword targeting for Etsy and Google search

Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who is:



creative and internet-savvy

familiar with crypto culture, 
s, and online communities

able to move fast without sacrificing quality

comfortable using AI tools to improve output

able to identify products that have real sales potential

organized and detail-oriented

experienced with e-commerce and print-on-demand workflows

Required Skills



You should have experience with most of the following:



graphic design for apparel or print-on-demand

crypto / finance / 
 culture understanding

Etsy product listing optimization

Shopify product listing workflow

product mockups and presentation

AI-assisted content or design tools

transparent PNG and print-ready file creation

basic SEO / keyword research

trend spotting and product research

Preferred Experience



Strong preference for candidates with experience in one or more of these:

Shopify print-on-demand stores

crypto or finance merchandise

viral 
 products

Canva / Photoshop / Illustrator / Kittl

ChatGPT / AI prompt writing

POD platforms such as Printify, Printful, CustomCat, etc.



Deliverables / Weekly Expectations



Expected weekly output may include:

title: Experienced Credit Repair Disputer (FCRA & FDCPA Expert)
description:
Experienced Credit Repair Disputer (FCRA & FDCPA Expert)



**Job Description:**



We are looking for a **skilled, proactive, and highly organized Credit Repair Disputer** to join our growing credit repair team. The ideal candidate must have **strong experience with U.S. credit laws, dispute strategies, and credit bureau processes**.



This role requires someone who is detail-oriented, knowledgeable, and capable of handling disputes professionally while maintaining accurate documentation for every client file.



**Responsibilities:**



* Review client credit reports from all three bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)

* Identify **inaccuracies, inconsistencies, and violations**

* Write **personalized dispute letters** for each client and each dispute round

* Include **screenshots of the credit report highlighting the specific inaccuracies** being challenged

* Track disputes and responses from credit bureaus and creditors

* **Rewrite and refresh dispute letters every 90 days** to ensure they pass through the **ACDV system used by credit bureaus**

* Maintain organized client files and dispute history

* Communicate professionally with the team regarding dispute progress

* Follow **FCRA and FDCPA compliance standards**



**Requirements:**



* Strong knowledge of **FCRA and FDCPA laws**

* Proven experience in **credit repair dispute processing**

* Ability to write **custom dispute letters (not templates)**

* Understanding of how the **ACDV system works**

* Excellent **organization and attention to detail**

* Ability to **highlight and document inaccuracies with screenshots**

* Strong written English skills

* Professional, reliable, and easy to work with



**Preferred Experience:**



* Experience working with **credit repair companies**

* Familiarity with **Metro 2 reporting**

* Knowledge of common dispute strategies and compliance practices



**How to Apply:**



Please include:



1. Your **experience with credit repair disputes**

2. Which **laws and dispute strategies you typically use**

3. A **sample dispute letter you have written**

4. The credit repair software you have used (if any)



We are looking for someone **long-term who takes pride in doing detailed, high-quality dispute work.**

title: AI Voice Developer - Production-Ready Voice Agents & SMS Automation
description:
We're ToneHaus, an AI voice agency building custom voice AI systems for trades and SMBs. We're looking for a production-ready AI voice developer to build out 2 voice AI systems and 1 SMS automation agent starting Monday.



This is not entry-level. We need someone with proven experience shipping production voice agents, not proof of concepts or tutorials.



THE PROJECT

Phase 1 (Weeks 2-3):



- Build 2 custom voice AI agents (inbound call handling, lead qualification, appointment booking)

- Build 1 SMS automation system (lead follow-up, confirmations, notifications)

- Integration with existing CRM/booking platforms (Payaca, BigChange and ServiceM8)

- Testing and refinement



Phase 2 (Ongoing):

If Phase 1 goes well, we have a consistent pipeline of client projects through our agency. This could be 20-40 hours/week of ongoing work with long-term stability.



WE NEED

? Proven experience building production voice AI agents (not tutorials, not demos)

? Evidence of work: active phone number from a past client, backend system walkthrough, case study, or similar

? Experience with voice/telephony platforms (11Labs, Retell AI, Twilio, etc.)

? Understanding of LLMs and prompt engineering

? Experience with n8n or similar automation platforms

? Ability to integrate with CRM/booking systems (Calendly, HubSpot, Airtable, etc.)

? Reliable communication and organised workflow



WHAT WE'LL ASK IN YOUR APPLICATION

Before applying, be prepared to answer:



Your Voice AI Experience: Walk us through a production system you built. What was the business problem? What tools did you use? What were the results?



Your Evidence: Provide one of the following:



An active phone number from a past client's business (we'll call it to test)

A backend system walkthrough (Loom video or call) showing your architecture

A detailed case study with metrics

Links to deployed systems you've built



Your Building Process:

WHY THIS MATTERS

We work with real businesses: plumbers, HVAC contractors, med spas, roofing companies. Their customers are calling expecting a real experience. We need someone who:



- Ships production-quality code

- Tests thoroughly

- Thinks about edge cases and user experience

- Communicates clearly and promptly

- Can scale with us



WHAT'S NEXT?



If you have solid production experience and real evidence of work, apply with:

We'll review applications and start conversations with people who meet the requirements.

title: Phone Videographer
description:
Earn ?12,000/month filming products with your phone at your local mall.



No experience needed. No editing needed. No talking needed. Just your smartphone and a steady hand.



We run a product review channel. We need someone in Manila or Cebu to film short, silent product clips at SM Mall, Robinsons, or any large electronics/home goods store. We handle all editing, voiceover, and post-production — you just film.



PAY:

- Fixed ?12,000/month

- Minimum 300 product videos per month (about 8 mall visits)

- Paid monthly via PayPal

- You choose your own schedule — go whenever it's convenient for you



WHAT YOU'LL DO:



1. Go to any large mall near you

2. Find products on the shelves and film them. All categories are welcome as long as the product sells on Amazon US. That said, some categories earn more for us than others, so when you have a choice, here's the priority:



   TOP TIER: Headphones, earbuds, portable speakers, soundbars, projectors, kitchen appliances (air fryers, blenders, coffee machines)

   STRONG: Home improvement tools, smart home devices, beauty products, office equipment

   GOOD: Toys, pet products, outdoor gear, furniture, home decor, garden tools



   Everything else is still worth filming — if it's on a shelf and it's on Amazon US, film it.



3. Film the price tag or product label clearly and up close (5 sec)

4. Slowly walk around the product — show the build quality, materials, buttons, ports, packaging, and any features or accessories (60-90 sec)

5. Upload the clips to a shared Google Drive folder



IMPORTANT FILMING RULES:



- No talking in the video. Silent footage only.

- Wait until the aisle is clear before filming. No other shoppers should be visible in the shot.

- Keep the camera steady and move slowly. Think "product showcase", not vlog.

- Never film the same product twice. If you've already filmed it, skip it and find something new.

- Before filming, quickly check if the product is sold on Amazon US (I will show you how — it takes 5 seconds with an app on your phone).



WHAT GETS REJECTED (does not count toward your 300):

- Blurry or shaky video

- Product label not clearly readable

- Other people visible in the shot

- Duplicate product (already filmed before)

- Products not sold on Amazon US



I will send you example videos I filmed myself so you can see exactly what a good clip looks like. The bar is not high — just clear, steady, and focused on the product.



This is perfect for students, freelancers, or anyone who visits malls regularly and wants easy extra income on their own schedule.



TO APPLY: Film a quick test video of any product near you right now. Show the label up close, then slowly walk around the product for 30 seconds. No talking. Attach it to your application.

title: Editing VA -Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more
description:
Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more



Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcut.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  



Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:



Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing, sorting and compiling b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage. These are typically fast cuts, that need to be highly engaging. Lots of movement but simple edits. These will be for Tiktok videos and eventually we will repurpose to other platforms.



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:



Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.













Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.







B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.











Skit work- typically these are one take but a lot of times we need to cut videos together if there are mistakes. You need to be able to recognize those mistakes and clear them out to make it a seamless video. 

















You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 3-4h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as you are consistent and videos are being completed)

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



$300-$400/month + bonuses for 3-4h a day MAX and potential full time work in the future with a salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create with a reference video: Please choose 2 



Google drive:

Broll: 

Talking Head: 

Product Video: 





Download the files and import into your video editing software

Please complete the following steps:



Broll: 

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

Message me with a link to the re-created video 



Talking Head: 

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Cut out all dead space between videos

Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

Do not use transitions between clips, static clips only.

Message me a link to re-create video



Product Video: 

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Cut out all dead space between videos

Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

Using the reference video and context, place overlays in the proper spots

Pay attention to overlay position and length

Make them big enough to see/read, but not so big they dominate the screen

Do not use any transitions, static overlays only

Message me a link to re-create video





Please Respond back to me beginning with the word “blue”

title: Performance Video Editor for Winning Meta Ads
description:
We’re looking for a highly skilled Performance Video Editor to help us iterate on winning Meta video ads.



This is not a role focused on creating brand films or editing generic social content. Your main job is to take proven winning ad concepts and turn them into high-quality variations that improve engagement, retention, clarity, and freshness, without damaging what made the ad work in the first place.



You will work with existing winning creatives that we hand to you. We will usually provide the strategic direction, testing hypothesis, new hooks when relevant, and structured feedback. We are looking for someone who can execute at a high level, collaborate well, and bring strong performance-editing instincts to the table.



What you’ll do

- Create variations of existing winning Meta video ads

- Improve pacing, tighten edits, and shorten videos where needed

- Add VFX, sound effects, motion emphasis, and visual polish to key moments

- Add and refine subtitles, captions, text overlays, and on-screen hierarchy

- Integrate B-roll and additional voice-over when provided

- Clean up audio and improve overall sound quality

- Clean up cuts and make edits feel sharper and more intentional

- Deliver polished, finished 9:16 exports optimized for Meta paid social

- Revise quickly and accurately based on structured feedback

- Occasionally suggest smart edit improvements beyond the brief, with reasoning



What this role is focused on

This role is about iterating on winners, not reinventing them.



We want someone who understands how to:

- preserve the winning core of an ad

- create controlled variations tied to a specific testing hypothesis

- improve engagement in different ways through editing

- make key moments land harder without overediting

- balance direct-response performance with high production quality



What we’ll provide

- The winning concept to iterate on

- A clear brief and testing hypothesis for each variation

- New hooks when needed

- Ideas for moments to emphasize

- Additional VO, B-roll direction, or text direction when relevant

- Structured feedback for revisions

- Our Brand Book with brand direction



What we need from you

- Strong experience editing performance creative / direct-response ads

- Strong understanding of Meta paid social

- Excellent pacing and retention instincts

- Advanced editing skills beyond basic raw UGC cutting

- Strong subtitle and text-overlay design sense

- Strong VFX / SFX / motion enhancement instincts

- Clean audio editing and finishing ability

- Ability to follow a brief while also contributing thoughtful ideas

- Strong organization, file hygiene, and version control

- Ability to deliver finished work at a consistently high standard



Important constraints

- The first 3 seconds are generally off-limits in terms of changing the underlying footage

- Effects, polish, and editing improvements can be added, but the core opening footage usually stays

- These are hypothesis-driven variations, not random creative remixes

- Revisions are part of the process and should not be an issue

- Deliverables must be high quality, with Meta-optimized resolutions and exports



Ideal profile

You’re likely a strong fit if you:

- have edited for DTC brands or performance agencies

- understand retention, payoff, proof, pacing, and direct-response structure

- know how to make ads feel fresher without changing the core concept too much

- can collaborate with founders / marketers and improve execution quality

- understand that every edit should serve performance, not just aesthetics



Nice to have

- Experience with supplement, wellness, health, or consumer product brands

- Ability to work in Premiere Pro and After Effects

- Ability to source or create tasteful supporting motion / visual enhancement where needed

- Familiarity with version testing workflows



Working setup

- Freelance to start

- Potential for regular ongoing work / retainer if the fit is strong

- Work will be assigned on a concept-by-concept basis around winning ads we want to scale or refresh



To apply

Please send:

- a short introduction

- relevant examples of performance / direct-response ad edits

- examples where you created variations of an existing winning concept

- the software you use

- your typical turnaround times

- your rate structure

- whether you are open to a paid trial task



When applying, include the phrase: “controlled variation beats random editing” so we know you read the full brief.

title: WEB DEVELOPER - WordPress/Elementor
description:
WordPress / Elementor Developer — Freelance 



We’re looking for an experienced WordPress/Elementor developer to build two websites from provided design files. This is a freelance, remote role billed hourly. Candidates based anywhere are welcome, but you must be available for at least a few hours overlap with UK business hours (GMT/BST) for communication and collaboration. 

 

About the project 

The Shala yoga studio and The Shala School of Yoga were once under the same directorship and shared a single website (
). They are now two separate businesses, each with their own director. The shared site needs to be separated into two distinct sites: 

— 
 — for Vahni at The Shala  for  yoga studio classes and workshops 

— The Shala School of Yoga under theshalalondon address, for teacher trainings  

 

The project will be divided into two phases as follows and you will bill the two businesses respectively  

 

PHASE 1 – VAHNI  

What you’ll be doing 

— Archiving the existing site properly so all data is retained and retrievable  

 

— Building a WordPress/Elementor Pro site from provided design files  (Figma/HTML mockups)

 

— Working closely with our team on a clear design handoff and building faithfully to that spec 

 

— Migrating and organising content from the existing shared WordPress site into the new site 

 

— Integrating Momence as the booking platform in the same way it is integrated currently 

 

— Setting up a dynamic events/workshop system with SEO-optimised content in WordPress (not reliant on Momence for indexing) 

 

— Implementing SEO migration — preserving existing URLs, 301 redirects, and applying meta data provided by our SEO team 

 

— Ensuring strong UX throughout — the sites must be clean, fast, accessible, and easy to navigate 

 

PHASE 2 – THE SHALA SCHOOL BUILD 

What you’ll be doing 

— Building a WordPress/Elementor Pro site from provided HTML templates 

 

— Working closely with the team on any updates/design tweaks 

 

— Migrating and organising content from the existing WordPress site into the new site 

 

— Integrating Momence as the booking platform – the integration here is very straightforward. 

 

— Implementing SEO migration — preserving existing URLs, 301 redirects, and applying meta data provided by our SEO team 

 

— Ensuring strong UX throughout — the site must be clean, fast, accessible, and easy to navigate  

 

 

What we’re looking for: 

— Strong WordPress and Elementor Pro experience — you must be proficient, not just familiar. Minimum 5 years experience 

 

— Solid knowledge of WordPress plugins — you should know which tools to use and why 

 

— Comfortable building from a designer’s Figma handoff and/or HTML mockups — your role is to build to spec, not interpret design direction 

 

— Experience with booking platform integrations - we work with Momence

 

— Understanding of SEO best practices in WordPress builds 

 

— Strong UX sensibility — you build sites that feel considered, not just functional 

 

— Clear communicator & excellent English — we’ll be working remotely and need daily progress updates 

 

— Available for at least a few hours overlap with UK business hours 

 

Nice to have 

— Familiarity with The Events Calendar or similar WordPress events plugins 

 

— Experience with WPX hosting 

 

To apply 

Please share  

- a link to your portfolio 

- two or three examples of the best WordPress/Elementor sites you’ve built 

- your hourly rate 

- a brief note on your experience with booking system integrations and working from design handoffs would be helpful. 

 

We’re moving quickly on this — responsive candidates will be prioritised. 



*There may be opportunities for ongoing support and maintenance work following launch.

title: Telecom AutoCAD Permit Drafter (Remote – Telecom Experience Required)
description:

TESINC, LLC is a fast-growing broadband engineering company specializing in telecom and utility design. We support U.S.-based telecom infrastructure projects and are expanding our remote drafting team.



We are looking for a reliable, experienced Telecom AutoCAD Drafter who wants consistent, long-term work and the opportunity to grow with a strong and supportive team.

You’ll collaborate closely with engineers and project managers to produce accurate, high-quality drawings that meet U.S. permitting standards.

Nice to Have

What We Offer

- Long-term, stable work opportunity

- Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling company

description:
Amazon & Ecommerce Manager — MySweetSmile (Remote, Full-Time)



ABOUT US



MySweetSmile is an award-winning teeth whitening and oral care brand with over 1,000,000 customers globally. We're the UK's #1 teeth whitening brand (The Independent, 2023 & 2024), sold across Amazon UK, US, and EU, Shopify, TikTok Shop, and multiple retail marketplaces. We're growing fast and need someone to own our marketplace operations full-time.



THE ROLE



You'll be the person who lives inside our Amazon accounts and marketplace platforms every single day. Your job is to ensure every listing, every market, and every backend detail is optimised, accurate, and up to date — so the founder doesn't have to.

This is not a VA role. This is full ownership of marketplace operations across multiple platforms and countries.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Amazon (Primary — 50% of role)

- Listing management across UK, US, DE, FR, ES, IT, NL, SE, PL — titles, bullet points, descriptions, backend keywords, search terms, product categories

- A+ Content creation, Brand Story updates, and image gallery management

- Flat file uploads and feed file management

- Listing experiments (A/B testing titles, images, bullets)

- Promotions setup and management (coupons, deals, Brand Tailored Promotions)

- Backend compliance: ingredients, directions for use, safety warnings, category accuracy

- Translations and localisation for EU marketplaces (using AI tools is expected)

- Keeping all marketplaces aligned to a universal standard set by the founder



New Product Launches & Marketplace Expansion (15% of role)

- End-to-end listing creation for new MySweetSmile products across all active marketplaces — content, A+ pages, compliance, and go-live readiness

- Facilitating new marketplace launches as we expand into UAE, Saudi Arabia, Japan, Singapore, and beyond — account setup, listing creation, marketplace-specific requirements, and ensuring all content meets local standards

- Working with the founder and operations team to coordinate launch timelines



Other Marketplaces (10% of role)

- TikTok Shop listing & store management

- Superdrug, Debenhams, OnBuy, and other retail marketplace listings

- Ensuring product data, imagery, and pricing is consistent across all channels



Inventory & Stock Coordination (10% of role)

- Monitoring FBA stock levels daily across all marketplaces

- Flagging restock requirements to the operations team before stockouts occur

- Coordinating on inbound shipment timelines and inventory planning

- Tracking stock positions across non-Amazon channels



Reporting & Competitor Monitoring (10% of role)

- Weekly marketplace performance report summarising sales, stock levels, and key metrics across all channels

- Reviewing advertising agency performance and flagging concerns to the founder

- Weekly competitor monitoring — tracking pricing, listing changes, and new product activity in our category



Creative & Design (5% of role)

- A+ Content design and image gallery creation in Canva

- Updating lifestyle and product imagery across listings

- Graphic design for marketplace-specific assets



WHAT YOU MUST HAVE — NON-NEGOTIABLE



If you don't have all of the following, this role is not for you.



- 3+ years of hands-on Amazon Seller Central experience — you know flat files, backend fields, feed management, and catalogue operations inside out. Not just UI editing.

- Experience managing listings across at least 5 Amazon marketplaces

- Experience launching products on new Amazon marketplaces (especially UAE, JP, SA, SG, AU)

- Confident with A+ Content, Brand Registry, and Brand Story creation

- Confident with Canva or similar design tools for A+ content, image galleries, and basic graphic design

- Experience with TikTok Shop or other non-Amazon marketplace platforms

- Experience with Shopify (product page updates, imagery, descriptions, pricing)

- Experience with Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar Amazon tools

- Basic understanding of Amazon PPC — enough to review an agency's performance, flag issues, and ask the right questions

- Experience with European marketplace translations and localisation

- Experience using AI tools (Claude, etc.) for copywriting, translations, and productivity — this is how we work and you'll be expected to use them daily

- Amazon compliance knowledge: ingredients, origin documentation, safety warnings, category requirements

- Strong written English

- Self-starter who takes full ownership and doesn't wait to be told what to do

- Detail-obsessed — you spot a wrong bullet point, a missing keyword, or an incorrect category and it bothers you



TOOLS WE USE

-Amazon Seller Central (global), Canva, Shopify, Notion, Slack, Google Sheets, Google Drive, Helium 10, AI tools (Claude)



SCHEDULE



Flexible within UK business hours overlap. We need at least 4–5 hours of crossover with UK time (GMT/BST) daily. Full-time, 50 hours per week, 6 days (1 fixed day off).



COMPENSATION



Depending on experience. Long-term role with room to grow as the brand scales into new markets and product lines.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



- You only know basic VA-level Amazon tasks

- You've never worked with flat files or feed management

- You don't have marketplace expansion experience

- You can't design A+ content or work in Canva

- You need hand-holding or frequent check-ins

- You've never used AI tools for productivity

- You can't work independently across time zones

- You want a regular 9-5. 



HOW TO APPLY



Title your application: "MSS Amazon & Ecommerce Manager — [Your Name]"



Include:

- A short intro (3–4 sentences) on why you're the right fit

- A link to a Google Sheet or Doc showing your Amazon marketplace experience — specifically which marketplaces you've managed, what tasks you handled, and any results you achieved

- One example of A+ Content or an Amazon listing you've optimised (screenshot or link)



Applications that don't follow these specific steps will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor who #Believes in Entrepreneurs| Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome Video Editor!’ in the subject line. Please apply through OnlineJobsPh and not via
. The job responsibilities include editing the first minute of videos to grab and keep the audience's attention, selecting the most engaging clips, adding eye-catching transitions and effects, ensuring the sound and visuals are top-notch, and staying on top of the latest trends to keep things fresh. Our goal is to get to 70% audience retention in the first minute. Additionally, strong creativity, attention to detail, and effective communication skills are essential to produce high-quality videos that engage viewers and meet retention goals. Please also share the link to your resume and portfolio, what your hourly salary expectations are, and in the first line of your message tell us how many YouTube subscribers Evan Carmichael has, followed by who your favorite entrepreneur of all time is and why. The job is full time (40 hours per week) with a flexible schedule. We would start off with a small project for now and we'd pay you for your ideas and research. We also like to work with people over a long period of time, not just short contracts, and give them opportunities to succeed and do more based on what they want to learn. Hopefully that will be you! Thank you for reading and good luck! Sending lots of love! -Irish #Believe

title: VIDEO EDITOR
description:
Before you apply, read this carefully.

We run one of the fastest-growing pet brands online.

DTC. Performance-focused. High volume.

And we're looking for a Video Editor who actually knows what they're doing.

Not someone who cuts clips together.

Someone who makes people stop scrolling.

What the job is:

You receive a script. You deliver a scroll-stopping, emotion-driven video ad. Within 24 hours.

That's it. 

What we need from you:

? Strong editing skills (pacing, sound design, motion, storytelling)

? AI tools fluency : you must be actively using AI in your workflow (voiceover, generation, enhancement,.. we don't care which, but you need to know them)

? Consistency. Speed. No excuses.

? Available for weekly projects, long-term

You are NOT a fit if:

? You apply with a generic message

? You've never edited a performance ad before

? You need 3 days to deliver a 60-second video

? You don't use AI tools in your process



The Hiring Process:



Trial Task : 45 to 60 sec video from our script. 24h delivery. Unpaid. This filters out everyone who's not serious.

Paid Project Trial : Full brand video. If it's good, short interview follows.

One-Month Paid Trial : Weekly projects with feedback.

Long-Term Offer : For those who consistently deliver.





ONE MORE THING.

We get a lot of applications.

Most of them are copy-paste. Vague. Useless.

If yours looks like that, we won't even open it.

To apply, your message must follow this exact structure :



Full Name:

Age:

City:

Years of experience in video editing:

AI tools you actively use:

Link to past video ads (not general reels, ad content):

One sentence: why should we pick you over everyone else?

Loom Video (2-3 min, in English, introduce yourself):

If your message doesn't follow this structure exactly, it gets ignored.

We're not harsh. We're just focused.

The right person will love this.

title: Long-Form Video Editor (Agency Full Time Job)
description:
About Us

We’re The 1% Studio — a fast-growing editing agency that helps creators, entrepreneurs, and brands scale their online presence through high-quality content. We specialize in creating high-performing YouTube videos, Reels, and TikToks that drive growth, engagement, and authority.



About the Role

We’re looking for a highly skilled Long-Form YouTube Editor to join our team and create high-quality trading education content. This is not basic editing — we want someone who can bring concepts to life through clean visuals, strong storytelling, and advanced motion graphics.



You’ll be editing in-depth trading videos that break down strategies, concepts, and market analysis in a way that is both engaging and easy to understand. The goal is to turn complex information into visually compelling, high-retention content.



You must be able to edit at a very high level, similar to top creators in the finance and education space, with a strong focus on motion graphics, animation, and clean visual storytelling.



You’ll need to be able to edit videos like this:







Responsibilities



Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–20 minutes) focused on trading education

Use advanced motion graphics and animation to simplify and explain trading concepts

Create engaging intros (30–60 seconds) using the strongest hooks, visuals, and key 
nts

Design clean, high-quality on-screen visuals (charts, diagrams, overlays, annotations)

Maintain a consistent, premium visual style across all content

Structure videos for maximum retention, pacing, and clarity

Communicate clearly, take feedback well, and deliver edits on time



Requirements



Expert-level video editing skills (Premiere Pro / Final Cut / After Effects)

Strong motion graphics and animation ability (this is essential)

Experience editing educational or finance-related content is a big plus

Deep understanding of pacing, storytelling, and viewer retention

Ability to turn complex topics into simple, engaging visuals

Strong attention to detail in sound design, color grading, and overall polish

This is a part-time role focused on consistent execution, clear reporting, and measurable results.

title: Short-Form Content Clipper & Distribution Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
I’m looking for a skilled, reliable, and self-motivated virtual assistant to help me build and operate a short-form content distribution system for my YouTube ministry channel, Prophetic Pigeons.

This is NOT a generic social media management role. You will be building a multi-account distribution network from scratch — creating and managing 40+ themed social media accounts across TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and X 
), then clipping and distributing short-form video content across all of them on a daily basis.

Your job has two content tracks:

Track 1 — Curated Content (Other Creators)

You will identify, clip, and post viral content from well-known faith and prophetic creators across the space. This is how we grow the accounts — by curating the best content in the niche so each themed page builds a real, engaged following. You will always credit original creators appropriately.

Track 2 — Original Content (Prophetic Pigeons)

You will clip my long-form YouTube teachings, sermons, Bible studies, and prophetic content into short-form videos (15–90 seconds) optimized for each platform. These clips get mixed into the account feeds alongside the curated content at a strategic ratio.



The goal: build 40+ active themed pages that collectively generate hundreds of thousands of views per month, driving attention and followers back to the main Prophetic Pigeons channel.



Key Responsibilities

Account Creation & Growth

 ? Create and warm 40+ niche-themed accounts across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and X

 ? Follow proper account warming protocols (7–10 days of organic engagement before posting)

 ? Develop unique bios, profile images, and niche angles for each account

 ? Manage cross-account engagement (comments, duets/stitches, story shares)

Competitive Research & Curation

 ? Identify the top 15–20 viral creators in the faith, prophetic, Bible teaching, and worship space

 ? Monitor trending clips weekly and pull top performers into the content rotation

 ? Track which content formats, hooks, and topics perform best across platforms

 ? Build and maintain a clip source library organized by creator, topic, and platform

Clip Production

 ? Clip long-form Prophetic Pigeons videos into 15–25 short-form pieces per video

 ? Clip viral moments from other established creators in the faith space

 ? Add captions (auto-generated + reviewed for accuracy), hook text overlays, and branded outro frames

 ? Create 2–3 hook variations per clip for multi-account distribution

 ? Produce 80–100+ clips per month across both content tracks

Distribution & Scheduling

 ? Post 2–3x per day per account (mix of curated + original content)

 ? Stagger posting times across accounts to avoid platform spam detection

 ? Maintain a content calendar and posting schedule

 ? Target 2,000–3,000+ total posts per month across the network by Month 2

Analytics & Reporting

 ? Track follower growth, views, and engagement per account weekly

 ? Identify top-performing clips, hooks, formats, and posting times

 ? Deliver a simple weekly analytics report

 ? Recommend strategy adjustments based on data

Systems & Documentation (Month 3)

 ? Document all workflows into a comprehensive SOP package

 ? Create brand guidelines, clip templates, and approved content examples

 ? Set up and build out a Whop community for external clippers

 ? Write onboarding materials and submission guidelines for clippers

 ? Assist in recruiting and onboarding the first 5–8 clippers



Required Skills

 ? Strong experience with short-form video editing — CapCut proficiency is essential

 ? Deep familiarity with TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and X — you understand how the algorithms work, what content gets pushed, and how to grow pages

 ? Experience creating or managing theme pages / fan pages / clip accounts — this is the #1 qualification. If you’ve built niche pages before, you understand the game.

 ? Eye for viral content — you can watch a 30-minute video and know which 45 seconds will get the most engagement

 ? Self-motivated and organized — this is a part-time role with a lot of autonomy. You need to manage your own schedule and hit daily posting targets without being micromanaged.

 ? Comfortable working with faith-based / Christian content — you don’t have to share the faith, but you must be respectful of the content and understand the audience

 ? Strong written English — for captions, bios, and clipper community management

title: Brand Deal Fulfillment Coordinator
description:
We broker and manage brand partnerships on behalf of our creators — handling negotiations, deal structure, and execution so our talent can focus on making content. This role sits right at the center of that work.



We're looking for someone to own the execution side of our brand deals from close to delivery. You'll be the bridge between our brand clients and our talent — making sure creators are briefed, concepts get executed correctly, timelines are hit, and every deal lands cleanly.



From day one you'll be in direct contact with brands and talent on real, active campaigns. This is a coordination and accountability role, not a creative or strategy role. If you get satisfaction from making sure nothing falls through the cracks — and you want to learn the influencer business from the inside — this is the right seat.



—



HOW A DEAL MOVES THROUGH YOU



Receive & review the concept — Review deal terms and the creative brief. Make sure deliverables, usage rights, and deadlines are airtight before anything moves to the creator.

Brief the creator — Deliver the brief, confirm they understand expectations, and answer questions. You're the primary point of contact between the brand and talent during production.

Manage production & approvals — Track submissions, run the brand review process, and coordinate any revision requests or reshoots until the concept is signed off.

Confirm go-live — Verify content posted on schedule and all deliverable requirements were met.

Close it out — Alert accounting to send the invoice. Flag the completed deal to your manager so they can go after the next one.

—



QUALIFICATIONS



Required: · Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field · Strong written and verbal communication skills · Highly organized — able to manage multiple active deals simultaneously · Comfortable holding people to deadlines without burning the relationship · Detail-oriented — you catch when a submission doesn't match the brief



Preferred: · Prior experience in account management, talent coordination, PR, or agency operations · Familiarity with influencer marketing platforms (Grin, Aspire, or similar) · Working knowledge of major social platforms and how sponsorship disclosures work



—



THIS ROLE DOES NOT INCLUDE · Market research or trend analysis · Sourcing or pitching brand deals · Creative strategy or campaign concepting · Content creation or social media management



—





WHAT IT'S LIKE HERE



We care about output, not hours logged.



If you're early in your career, hungry to learn, and want to be close to where deals actually get made — we want to hear from you.



To be considered, please let respond by telling us the following in your response

1. Have you worked a deal fulfillment role before?

2. Are you someone who is extremely responsive on a moments notice?

3. What is your favorite animal and why?

title: Senior Liaison Officer - Remote
description:
We are a U.S.-based investment firm focusing on risk monitoring and management for prediction purpose. We specialize in watching geopolitical hot topics, providing updates in advance in order to prove the stable profits growth of clients we serve for. In different regions around the world, focuses vary, and we tailor our services to meet specific needs. Given to the geographical location and strategic importance, the Philippines has always been a hot hub around the Indo-Pacific region.



In such context, we are now seeking a Senior Liaison Officer for our Philippine office. This role will serve as a critical bridge between our clients, external stakeholders, and internal teams. The officer will focus on building networks, ensuring smooth information flow, and aligning client needs with strategic and practical goals.



Key Responsibilities:

•Information Gathering: Collect relevant information from government agencies, legislative bodies, and other stakeholders to support clients' policy analysis and decision-making.

•Report Writing: Prepare clear, concise, and well-organized reports based on on-site information collection, tailored to project requirements for clients' review.

•Risk Monitoring: Track emerging risks and provide timely warnings about potential changes that may affect the smooth operation of the tasks .



Qualifications:

title: Full-Stack Developer - Upgrade Admin Panel, Client Panel and Mobile App
description:
We are MediTech, a healthcare-focused marketplace platform connecting patients with clinics and medical service providers. We have an existing source code base and are looking for an experienced full-stack developer (or small agency) to upgrade both our Admin Panel, Seller (Clinic) Panel and mobile app - removing irrelevant features, renaming sections to match our medical/booking context, and adding powerful new features including third-party booking API integrations, a no-show fee system, referral codes, payment state management, and more.



The ideal candidate must have proven experience integrating third-party calendar and booking platform APIs (such as Fresha, Booksy, Vagaro, and Aoikumo) with existing booking systems, ensuring seamless two-way sync between external platforms and our own.



The candidate should be able to connect to each platform's live availability feed — subscribing to real-time schedule data so that open slots are automatically surfaced on our platform as they become available. When a customer books through MediTech, that booking must be pushed back to the clinic's original platform to prevent double bookings and keep all systems in sync.



The candidate must also be able to architect and implement a dynamic discount rules engine, where clinic owners can configure time-based pricing tiers (for example, 24 hours before a slot = 15% off, 5 hours before = 20% off). This includes building a scheduled job system that automatically monitors upcoming appointment slots, applies the correct discount tier at the right time, and handles edge cases such as overlapping rules, discount stacking, and override logic — ensuring pricing is always accurate and applied without manual intervention.



The Current Tech stack: 

* Laravel powers our backend.

* Flutter runs our mobile apps.

* Reactjs empowers the Admin Panels.

* Typescript and Nextjs drives our high-performance website.

* To ensure smooth interactions and seamless integration, our platform is backed by Rest API.



I’m looking for someone to execute my requirements within a one-month timeline, including all revisions and changes needed along the way.



Upon successful completion of the project, I’d be open to offering a contract based role within my company, where you would be responsible for ongoing maintenance and support.



Send me your resume + portfolio. Looking forward to find the right match to work with me.

Acoustia is a fast-growing Dutch e-commerce brand selling affordable, discrete in-ear hearing aids to customers in the Netherlands and Belgium. We sell directly online and advertise aggressively on

We are looking for a talented Creative Designer to join our team and produce high-performing Meta ad creatives. You will start part-time, and if the quality of your work is strong, we will move to full-time quickly.

You will be producing around 10–15 creatives per day to start, increasing over time. This includes static image ads, video ads, reels, carousels, and stories — all in Dutch, as we advertise in the Netherlands and Belgium. If you specialize specifically in statics or video, you are still very welcome to apply.

How we work:

We move fast. We will provide you with the strategy behind each creative, and ad copy when needed. We will also share references from competitors so you always have clear direction. In return, we expect you to meet deadlines without being reminded — we advertise at high speed and timing matters.
