title: Senior SEO + Google Ads Lead (Local Service – Performance Focused)
description:
We’re a Las Vegas-based drain cleaning company focused on one thing:



???? Driving high-intent inbound calls and booked jobs — consistently.



We are looking for a senior-level SEO + Google Ads operator who has a track record of generating real leads for US-based local service businesses (plumbing, HVAC, etc.)



This is not a “traffic” role.

This is a performance role tied to calls, cost per lead, and revenue.



?



???? WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

 • Increased inbound call volume within 30–60 days

 • Reduced cost per lead across campaigns

 • Strong visibility in Google Maps + organic + paid search

 • High-converting landing pages aligned with search intent



?



? REQUIREMENTS:

 • Proven results with local service businesses in the US

 • Hands-on experience managing Google Ads (search + call-driven campaigns)

 • Deep understanding of high-intent keyword strategy

 • Experience optimizing Google Business Profile (Maps rankings)

 • Ability to build or guide conversion-focused landing pages

 • Strong grasp of call tracking, attribution, and lead quality



?



???? THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR:

 • Content writers or blog-focused SEOs

 • Backlink-only specialists

 • General VAs doing “SEO tasks”

 • Anyone without real performance metrics



?



???? IDEAL CANDIDATE:



You’ve:

 • Managed campaigns where phone calls were the primary KPI

 • Worked in competitive local markets

 • Made decisions based on data, not theory

 • Owned results — not just tasks



?



???? RESPONSIBILITIES:

 • Own and optimize Google Ads campaigns

 • Identify and rank for high-converting local keywords

 • Align SEO, paid traffic, and Maps for maximum coverage

 • Improve conversion rates across landing pages

 • Continuously reduce cost per lead while increasing volume



?



???? TO APPLY:



Answer the following clearly and specifically:



1. Describe a local service campaign where you increased calls or leads. Include numbers if possible.

2. If you were starting from scratch, how would you generate calls for a drain cleaning company in Las Vegas within 30–60 days?

3. What would you prioritize first: SEO, Google Ads, or Maps — and why?



?



???? HOURS & STRUCTURE:

 • Start part-time

 • Scale to long-term / full-time based on performance

 • Opportunity to grow with the company as we expand



?



???? FINAL NOTE:



We are looking for someone who thinks like an operator, not a task-doer.

If you’ve produced real results and can do it again, this will be a strong long-term opportunity.
salary: Higher pay for proven call generation

title: Content creation manager
description:
Content Creation (Part-Time, Remote | Growth Opportunity)

We are a fast-growing health & wellness brand focused on functional medicine (thyroid, metabolism, and root-cause healing). We’re looking for a high-performing Content Creation Assistant to help us scale across social media with intention and quality.

This is not a basic VA role — we are looking for someone who understands content, trends, and storytelling, and wants to grow with a brand long-term.

Role Overview

You will be responsible for supporting our content engine end-to-end:

Researching trends and viral content

Ideating and scripting posts

Editing and repurposing content

Posting across platforms (IG, TikTok, etc.)

Responsibilities

Study viral content and trends daily (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

Generate content ideas aligned with our niche (health/functional medicine)

Write scripts for:

Storytelling short-form videos

Educational content

Viral-style hooks and angles

Edit videos (B-roll, captions, pacing, hooks)

Repurpose long-form into multiple short-form pieces

Create carousel posts (educational + engaging)

Schedule and post content consistently

Collaborate and communicate with the team for feedback and improvements

Content Types You’ll Work On

Story-driven short-form videos

Viral-style content (hooks, trends, angles)

Educational/authority content

B-roll style videos

Carousel posts

Long-form ? short-form repurposing

Requirements

Strong understanding of social media trends and viral content

Experience with video editing tools (CapCut, etc.)

Good sense of storytelling, hooks, and audience psychology

High attention to detail and quality

Professional, reliable, and communicative

Fast learner with a growth mindset

Able to take feedback and improve quickly

Work Schedule

Part-time: 4 hours/day

1:00 PM – 5:00 PM PST (fixed schedule)

Compensation

$400/month (first 3 months – training period)

$500/month after 3 months (based on performance and fit)

Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility

Who This Is For

This role is ideal for someone who:

Wants to grow into a high-level content strategist

Is obsessed with improving content performance

Takes ownership and pride in their work

Wants to be part of building a meaningful brand

How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume or portfolio

Examples of content you’ve created (videos, edits, or posts)

A short Loom/video explaining:

Why you’re a good fit

Your experience with viral/trending content

Your favorite content creator and why

If you’re just looking for a basic VA job, this is not for you.

If you want to grow, learn, and build something meaningful — we want to hear from you.



Test assignment: 



Part 1: Viral Research (Thinking Test)

Find 3 viral videos in the health / wellness / weight loss / thyroid niche.

For each video:

Link the video

Explain:

Why it went viral (hook, structure, emotion, curiosity, etc.)

Who the target audience is

How you would adapt this for our brand (functional medicine / thyroid)

Part 2: Script Writing (Strategy + Copy)

Write a short-form video scripts (30–60 sec):

Topic: Root cause vs conventional medicine

Style: Educational + authority

Each script must include:

Strong hook (first 3 seconds)

Clear flow

Call-to-action (book a call / learn more)

Part 3: Short-form edited video by you.

Please send a link. 

Part 4: Carousel of any you already made before.

Please send a link. 



Potential to grow with the family to full-time as the company grows.

title: Virtual Assistant – Amazon Online Arbitrage
description:
We're looking for a fast learner who can grow with our Amazon OA business. This is not a mindless task role. We want someone who pays attention, takes initiative, and actually cares about doing good work.



What you'll do:

• Source profitable products using tools like Keepa & Selleramp

• Analyze deals (ROI, fees, sales rank) before submitting

• Maintain spreadsheets and send regular reports



What we need from you:

• Experience in Amazon FBA/OA or a VA role

• Strong English communication skills

• Reliable internet and a dedicated workspace

• Detail oriented, honest, and deadline driven

• Able to be self sufficient and get things done alone





To apply:

Send a short intro (3–5 sentences), your experience, and availability. Reply with your first your being "BATMAN" to insure that you have read this application. Applicants who respond without the first word being "BATMAN" will not be considered.

title: Expert Facebook Ads Specialist Needed
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a true
 expert to join us on a gig basis.



You must know the ins and outs of
 advertising, including how to properly set up and manage campaigns, target the right audiences, and help develop strategies for gaining more business and 
 through
.



It is very important that you know how to properly set up Amazon attribution links for
 ads and connect them correctly to landing pages built with WordPress and Elementor so ad traffic can be tracked properly.



This is not a beginner position.

Beginners do not apply.



We are specifically looking for someone who is highly experienced, dependable, and truly knows what they are doing. We need someone who can contribute at a high level from the beginning.



What we need:



Strong experience with
 ads

Must understand audience targeting, campaign strategy, setup, and optimization

Must know how to set up Amazon attribution links correctly

Must know how to connect attribution tracking with
 ads, landing pages, WordPress, and Elementor

Must be able to help with strategies for gaining more business and 
 through

Must be available for Zoom consulting sessions with our team

Must be comfortable doing face-to-face screen sharing, strategy sessions, and helping improve ads, listings, and research

Must be highly experienced and confident in your skills

Beginners do not apply



Position Details:



Gig basis to start

Hourly pay

Paid every Friday

Payment by Wise, Venmo, or Remitly



We already have a team in the Philippines, and we would like to add someone who is very experienced and a strong fit for our team.



This role usually starts on a gig basis, but many of our tea
mbers started this same way and later became full-time tea
mbers. So while this begins as gig work, it may turn into something long-term for the right person.



To Apply:

Please let us know why you would be a good fit for this position. Be specific about your
 ads experience, your experience with Amazon attribution links, and why you believe you are qualified.



God bless,

Eric B.

title: Experienced Sales Virtual Assistant for MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD | Inbound Calls, Cold Calling, Outreach & Closing
description:
MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD is looking for a highly experienced Sales Virtual Assistant to join our growing company for the long term.



We are not looking for just another VA.



We are looking for someone confident, persuasive, professional, and hungry to grow with a company that is building something serious in the cleaning industry.



This role is for someone who is excellent on the phone, speaks very strong English, knows how to speak with leads professionally, can handle both inbound and outbound calls, and already has real experience working with a residential cleaning company, commercial cleaning company, or both.



You must be able to prove your experience.



We are building for the long term, and we want someone who is not just looking for a temporary job, but someone who wants to become part of a company with growth, stability, and ongoing opportunity.



Main Responsibilities

Answer inbound calls from potential clients

Make outbound calls and cold calls to generate new business

Follow up with leads quickly and consistently

Do client outreach in high volume

Speak confidently with potential clients and handle objections

Help convert leads into booked appointments or closed deals

Communicate professionally by phone, message, and

Keep lead information organized and updated

What We Are Looking For

Excellent spoken and written English

Strong confidence on calls

Proven experience in sales

Proven experience working for a residential cleaning company, commercial cleaning company, or both

Strong ability in cold calling and client follow-up

Experience with high-volume outreach

Ability to close deals

Persuasive, professional, and confident communication

Organized, reliable, and consistent work ethic

Important



You must be able to prove that you have already worked in this type of role.



Please do not apply if you do not have real experience in:



cleaning company sales

cold calling

client outreach

closing



We are only looking for someone who already understands this environment and can bring value from the beginning.



Why Join Us



MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD is a growing company with a long-term vision.



We are looking for the right person to grow with us as we expand. For the right candidate, this is an opportunity to build a stable long-term role inside a business that values strong performance, commitment, and results.

title: Airbnb Virtual Assistant (Guest Communication & Operations | Long-Term Role)
description:
1. Role Overview



We are a growing short-term rental and Airbnb business managing multiple properties with documented systems, SOPs, and clear expectations.



We are hiring a reliable, detail-oriented Airbnb Virtual Assistant to support daily operations, guest communication, scheduling, and administrative tracking. This is a long-term role for someone who is organized, calm under pressure, and comfortable following systems precisely.



This is not a one-off gig. We are looking for someone who wants stability, consistency, and the opportunity to grow with the business over time.



--



2. Core Responsibilities



You will be responsible for the day-to-day operational support of our rental portfolio, including:

 • Responding to guest messages (pre-stay, during stay, and post-stay) in a professional and empathetic manner

 • Dealing with occasional upset guests in a professional, courteous, and empathetic manner 

 • Managing calendars, reservations, and availability

 • Coordinating and scheduling cleaners, maintenance, and turnovers

 • Logging guest issues, i
, and resolutions accurately

 • Updating spreadsheets, checklists, and task logs

 • Following SOPs exactly and documenting any edge cases or exceptions

 • Proactively identifying potential problems before they escalate

 • Supporting general administrative tasks as assigned



--



3. Required Skills & Traits



This role is a good fit if you are:

 • Highly detail-oriented and organized

 • Comfortable working with people who are happy, upset, and everything in between

 • Comfortable working with checklists, systems, and written procedures

 • Calm, professional, and clear in written AND spoken English

 • Proactive and able to think one step ahead

 • Reliable with consistent availability

 • Able to manage multiple properties and tasks without losing accuracy

 • Interested in a long-term position, not short-term or part-time gigs



--



4. Tools & Experience (Preferred)



Experience with the following is helpful, but training will be provided:

 • Airbnb platform and/or a Property Management System (PMS) such as Guesty, HostAway, etc

 • Google Workspace (Google Sheets, Docs)

 • Slack or similar communication tools

 • Breezeway

 • Task tracking tools (Notion, ClickUp, or similar)

 • Prior experience supporting Airbnb or short-term rental operations is a strong plus



--



5. Work Structure, Pay & Growth

 • Schedule: 30-40+ hours per week. Opportunity for more work if desired.

 • Timezone Overlap: Must be available during PST hours.

 • Contract Type: Independent Contractor

 • Pay: $500-$800+/mo (paid consistently; performance-based increases over time)

 • Growth Path: Pay will reliably increase over time with bonus opportunities if you are proactive, vigilant, and always looking to improve.

 • Increased responsibilities

 • Pay raises based on performance

 • Potential leadership or senior VA role as the portfolio grows

 • Potential for investment opportunity into Airbnbs if you go above and beyond in the maintenance and growth of the business



We value consistency, trust, and long-term collaboration.



?



6. Application Instructions (Required)



To apply, follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow them will not be reviewed.

 1. Start your application message with the phrase: “SYSTEMS FIRST”

 2. Briefly describe your experience (if any) with Airbnb, short-term rentals, or guest communication

 3. Answer the following  scenario in 3–5 sentences:

SCENARIO 1: A guest messages at 10:30 PM saying the internet is not working and they need it for work in the morning. How would you respond and what steps would you take?

SCENARIO 2: A guest messages saying that the house is not cleaned and the pool is dirty. How do you handle it and what steps would you take?

SCENARIO 3: A guest reports various potential issues with the house, but doesn't actually complain about them. How do you handle this so that it can be addressed before another guest complains about it?



--



We are looking for clear thinking, professionalism, attention to detail, and a desire to be a part of and grow this business!



--



If you are organized, reliable, and looking for a stable long-term role with a growing business, we encourage you to apply.

Excellent written and spoken English.



Strong organizational skills and the ability to work independently.



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace.

title: Part-time Video Editor & Graphic Designer – Short-Form Meta Ads
description:
Perfect, I can see the OnlineJobs.ph form. Here's exactly what to fill in for each field:

Job Title

Already filled in correctly — looks good.

Type of Employment

Select Gig — this fits best since it's per-video, variable volume, fully async. "Part Time" implies set hours which doesn't match your setup.

Job Description

Paste this into that box:



We run a Meta ads service producing short-form video ads for service-based businesses — window cleaning, house cleaning, and similar home service niches. We're hiring immediately and looking to get started right away.

The work: Edit 15–35 second ad clips in CapCut (desktop/Pro). We upload everything to Google Drive — footage, scripts, and example videos to match. You edit on your own schedule and upload finished files back within 24 hours. Fully async, no calls, no set hours, no micromanagement.

Bonus: If you have Canva experience, we'll also send occasional static ad creatives and flyers your way.

How we hire — no interview required: Qualified applicants receive a small paid test batch of 2–3 videos. We review the work and move forward from there. Simple.

What you'll do:



Edit short clips in CapCut to match provided examples

Overlay relevant B-roll that fits each script

Add clean, accurate, well-timed captions

Apply transitions, pacing cuts, basic audio/color cleanup

Upload finished files to the correct Drive folder within 24 hours

Occasional Canva flyers/static creatives (bonus)



Requirements:



Proficient in CapCut desktop/Pro

Experience with short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts, or paid ads)

Can source and place relevant B-roll

24-hour turnaround, no exceptions

Self-directed — this role runs fully on async

Reliable internet and a computer that handles video editing smoothly



Nice to have: Prior Meta/TikTok ad editing experience. Canva skills.

To apply: Send 2–3 examples of videos or ads you've edited. Include your available hours per week. Strong applicants will receive a paid test batch within 24 hours.

title: Personal Trainer (virtual)
description:
Personal Trainer & Health Coach (Part-Time, Remote | Functional Medicine Focus)

We are a growing health & wellness company specializing in functional medicine, thyroid optimization, and metabolic health. We are looking for a certified Personal Trainer / Health Coach who can support clients holistically—combining fitness, nutrition, and lifestyle coaching for individuals with chronic conditions such as thyroid dysfunction and diabetes.

This is a hybrid role combining coaching, communication, and light content support.

Role Overview

You will work closely with clients inside a structured program, helping them:

Improve energy, metabolism, and body composition

Build sustainable fitness and lifestyle habits

Navigate chronic conditions (thyroid, blood sugar, etc.) with guidance

You will also support internal content and educational materials for clients.

Responsibilities

Client Coaching

Conduct weekly 1-on-1 coaching calls

Provide personalized fitness and lifestyle guidance (beginner ? advanced)

Support clients with habit-building, accountability, and consistency

Adapt training and lifestyle strategies based on chronic conditions (thyroid, diabetes, etc.)

Client Communication

Actively engage with clients via messaging/thread (daily/ongoing support)

Answer questions and provide guidance in a timely, professional manner

Track client progress and flag any concerns to the team

Content & Support Tasks

Create client-facing educational materials (Canva PDFs, guides, resources)

Assist in building a knowledge base for clients (nutrition, lifestyle, exercise)

Perform basic video editing (short-form/simple edits for content)

Follow company SOPs and protocols consistently

Requirements

Certified Personal Trainer (NASM, ACE, ISSA, or equivalent)

Strong understanding of:

Exercise programming (beginner to advanced)

Nutrition fundamentals

Lifestyle coaching (sleep, stress, habits)

Experience working with clients with chronic conditions (thyroid, diabetes, metabolic issues) is highly preferred

Excellent communication and coaching skills

Organized, detail-oriented, and able to multitask

Comfortable using tools like Canva and basic video editing software

Professional, reliable, and responsive

Training Provided

You will be trained in our functional medicine protocols and frameworks

Clear guidance on coaching expectations, communication standards, and client journey

Work Schedule

Part-time: 4 hours/day

1:00 PM – 5:00 PM PST M-F (fixed schedule)

Compensation

Competitive monthly pay (based on experience) $400 to start for 4hrs/day for 5 days a week. 

Opportunity for growth into a senior coach role as the company scales

Who This Is For

This role is ideal for someone who:

Wants to go beyond basic personal training into root-cause, holistic health

Enjoys working closely with clients and seeing real transformation

Is proactive, communicative, and growth-oriented

Wants to be part of a mission-driven health company

How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume and certifications

Brief summary of your experience with clients (especially chronic conditions)

Any examples of coaching, programs, or content you’ve created

(Optional but preferred) A short Loom/video introducing yourself

If you’re passionate about helping people transform their health at a deeper level—not just workouts—we’d love to hear from you.





Part 1: Case Study (Advanced Coaching Scenario)

You are working with a client who is:

A high-level athlete

Recently diagnosed with Hashimoto’s disease

Experiencing:

Fatigue

Weight loss resistance

Fluctuating energy levels

Their goal:

Continue training at a high level (e.g., heavy compound lifts like 300 lb squats)

Improve body composition

Restore energy and long-term health



Part 2: Nutrition Strategy Question

Question:

What is the safest and most effective way to implement reverse dieting for long-term results?

Please include:

Your philosophy on reverse dieting

Step-by-step approach

Common mistakes to avoid

How you would adjust for someone with metabolic or thyroid dysfunction



For both parts, 2 paragraphs max.



Opportunity to grow, bonus and to onboard full-time.

title: Performance Marketer — Meta ads + Google Ads EXPERT | US Agency | $1,000/mo

If a campaign is dying you kill it. If something's working you scale it. I don't want to tell you what to do every day. I want to check in weekly and see results.

Right now we serve contractors (HVAC, concrete, roofing, marketing company marketing, Asset protection, and Real estate Funds. You'll manage 2-3 accounts to start, growing to 6-8 as we bring on clients.

What you'll actually do day to day:

Build and manage Google Ads search campaigns and Local Service Ads

Create your own ad images in Canva or WHATEVER YOU WANT when you need to test new creatives fast

Write ad copy variations and test hooks

Track cost per lead, cost per acquisition, and ROAS

Send me a weekly update: what's working, what's not, what you're changing



What I need from you:



You've managed at LEAST (of course we want more) $2,000/month in ad spend on Meta with actual results to show

You know the difference between a lead gen campaign and a traffic campaign and why it matters

You can make a decent looking ad in Canva or any editing tool without a designer holding your hand

You're comfortable in Google Ads, search + Local Service Ads 

You can work during US Pacific hours for at least 3 hours of overlap

You don't need me to tell you to check your campaigns every morning



$1,000/month. Full time. Long term. If you perform I'll add bonuses tied to results. and it will go up the more we do and continue together.

title: Private Online Psychiatric Mental Health Tutor, Nurse practitioner, Doctor (Nonprofit initiative)
description:
This opportunity is part of a nonprofit educational mission focused on supporting learning and development in the field of mental health. The goal is to help equip individuals with strong foundational knowledge in psychiatric mental health, especially for future service, education, and mission-driven work. By participating, you are contributing to a meaningful initiative that aims to expand understanding and access to mental health education.



?



Role Overview



We are looking for a licensed doctor, preferably a psychiatrist, or another highly qualified licensed mental health professional based in the Philippines to provide private one on one online tutoring in psychiatric mental health.



This is a paid education project, but it is not a clinical role, not for patient care, not for independent practice, and not a substitute for formal school, certification, or licensure. The purpose of this role is to deliver structured, high quality education in the core areas of psychiatric mental health knowledge.



?



About the Student



The student has a healthcare background, strong CDI and clinical documentation experience, and a strong ability to learn quickly. She already understands medical documentation and clinical workflows, but now wants to build deeper knowledge in psychiatric mental health.



She works full time, so the program must be:



• practical

• organized

• efficient

• flexible



?



What We Are Looking For



We are not looking for casual tutoring. We are looking for someone who can:



• mentor and guide the student in a structured way

• design a clear learning pathway from start to finish

• build a condensed, goal oriented program

• help bridge clinical documentation knowledge into psychiatric thinking



Your role is to equip and develop the student’s understanding, similar to a mentor or preceptor style relationship, but strictly for education only.



You should be able to take someone from a strong documentation background and help them understand how mental health professionals:



• assess patients

• think through symptoms

• form diagnoses

• choose treatment approaches

• understand medication logic

• document psychiatric encounters

• plan ongoing care



?



Program Expectations



The program should be structured and intentional, not random sessions.



You will be expected to propose a plan that explains:



• how you will take the student from point A to point Z

• how you will structure the learning (weekly, modules, etc.)

• how you will pace the program for someone working full time

• what outcomes the student should achieve by the end



We expect approximately one session per week, but you may recommend the best structure.



?



Core Topics to Cover



The program should build strong knowledge in the following areas:



• psychiatric assessment

• psychiatric interviewing

• mental status examination

• DSM based diagnosis

• differential diagnosis

• psychopharmacology

• medication selection and reasoning (for learning purposes only)

• treatment planning

• care planning

• psychiatric documentation, including SOAP style notes

• case based discussion

• clinical reasoning

• safety and risk assessment

• crisis awareness and escalation thinking

• basic psychotherapy concepts

• patient education

• follow up thinking and longitudinal care planning



?



End Goal



By the end of the program, the student should have a strong educational foundation in how psychiatric mental health professionals think and approach:



• assessment

• diagnosis

• treatment options

• medication reasoning

• documentation

• care planning



This is about developing clinical thinking and understanding, not just memorizing information.



?



Important Clarification



This program is strictly for education and knowledge building only.



It does not replace formal PMHNP education, certification, or licensure. The student is not seeking to practice based on this program alone.



?



Who This Is Best For



We are looking for:



• licensed doctor preferred

• psychiatrist strongly preferred

• other licensed mental health professionals with strong psychiatric experience may be considered



Ideal candidates will be:



• experienced in psychiatric or mental health care

• able to teach clearly in English

• comfortable with one on one online teaching

• organized, reliable, and professional

• experienced in teaching, mentoring, tutoring, precepting, or curriculum building

• able to design a structured learning program



A practicing doctor in the Philippines who wants flexible remote teaching work may be a strong fit.



?



Program Setup



• fully remote and online

• private one on one format

• flexible schedule

• approximately one session per week (or as proposed)

• short term, structured program preferred



?



Budget



• total budget: PHP 35,000 for the full program



?



Application Requirements



To apply, please send:



• your CV or resume

• your professional background

• your license and credentials

• your psychiatric or mental health experience

• any teaching, tutoring, mentoring, or precepting experience



• a short introduction video (3 minutes or less) introducing yourself, your experience, and your teaching style



• a brief proposal explaining:

• how you would structure the program

• how you would take the student from a clinical documentation background to strong psychiatric mental health knowledge

• what your teaching approach would be

• what outcomes you expect by the end



• your availability for an interview



?



Final Note



This is a unique opportunity to combine professional expertise with meaningful educational impact. As part of this nonprofit initiative, your contribution helps support mental health education and future service in this field.



We are looking for someone who takes teaching seriously and is willing to guide the student with clarity, structure, and purpose.

title: Direct Response Video Editor — Ads + VSLs | US Agency | $1,000/mo
description:

nt keeps people watching

title: AI Fashion Designer / Fashion Product Developer for Women’s Wear
description:
We are looking for an AI-driven Fashion Designer / Fashion Product Developer to help us develop women’s clothing styles based on customer preferences and market trends.



This job requires actual AI design skills. If you do not use AI tools, please do not apply.



Our main markets include the United States, as well as Latin American regions such as Mexico and Colombia. The ideal candidate must understand different customer tastes, including sexy, body-conscious styles, resort wear, and bold, high-impact fashion that performs well in these markets.



This is NOT a traditional fashion sketch-only role. We need someone who can combine fashion sense with AI tools (such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Midjourney) to quickly create trendy, sellable designs.



---



Key Responsibilities:



- Analyze customer preferences from different markets (US, Mexico, Colombia, South America)

- Develop fashion styles based on target customer taste and buying behavior

- Research trending styles from brands like Fashion Nova, Revolve, and Instagram trends

- Use AI tools to generate and refine fashion designs

- Create product-focused designs (not just concepts — must be sellable)

- Develop multiple variations from one design:

  - color versions  

  - print variations  

  - style adjustments  

- Continuously improve designs based on feedback and market direction



---



Requirements:



- Experience in women’s fashion design or fashion product development  

- Strong understanding of customer taste in US and Latin markets  

- Familiar with sexy fashion, bodycon styles, resort wear, and bold silhouettes  

- Experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Midjourney (or similar)  

- Ability to write prompts and generate design ideas using AI  

- Good sense of color, print, and proportions  

- Able to follow instructions strictly and pay attention to detail  

- Good English communication  



---



Preferred (Strong Advantage):



- Experience in e-commerce fashion (Amazon, Shopify, etc.)  

- Understanding of what makes a product “sell” (not just look good)  

- Experience creating:

  - multi-color versions  

  - print development  

  - product optimization versions  



---



To Apply:



Please send:



1. Your fashion portfolio  

2. Examples of AI-generated fashion designs (if available)  

3. A short explanation of your experience with AI tools  

4. Your expected salary  



---



Application Test (Required):



Please use AI tools to create 2–3 women’s fashion design ideas suitable for:



US / Mexico / Colombia markets  



Include:

- Design concept  

- Target customer style  

- Which AI tools you used

.



WHAT WE NEED

We are hiring a part-time Media Buyer to manage and optimize paid campaigns on Meta and Google Ads starting April. You will be working directly with our team — including our creative department and
 marketer — and reporting to leadership.

This is not a set-it-and-forget-it role. We need someone who monitors performance closely, acts fast, and thinks about every dollar spent as if it were their own. The right person will have a clear path to full-time.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

Research audiences and build targeting strategies

Manage budgets and ensure campaigns are pacing correctly

Collaborate with the creative and
 teams to align messaging across channels

REQUIREMENTS

Strong understanding of campaign structure, bidding strategies, and audience targeting

Ability to write clear, conversion-focused ad copy

eCommerce or DTC experience is a strong advantage

Available during CST (Chicago) business hours

Strong attention to detail and ability to manage budgets responsibly





YOU ARE THE RIGHT FIT IF YOU ARE



A go-getter who takes full ownership of campaign performance

Detail-oriented — budget errors and missed optimizations are not acceptable

Someone who treats deadlines and posting schedules as non-negotiable

Able to think critically, suggest strategies, and give honest feedback

Comfortable collaborating across teams in a fully remote setup

Proactive — you bring solutions, not just status updates





WHAT TO INCLUDE IN YOUR APPLICATION



Past campaign results — include ROAS, CTR, and ad spend managed where possible

A brief overview of a campaign you built from scratch and what the outcome was

Any relevant portfolio or case study showing your work

title: Outbound Business Development Representative (BDR) – Remote | Philippines
description:
Company Overview

We are a fast-growing sales organization managing multiple client campaigns across industries. Our team operates with discipline, speed, and professionalism and we're expanding our outbound BDR team with individuals who are ready to hit the ground running.



Role Overview

As an Outbound BDR, you will be the first point of contact for prospective clients across various campaigns. You will work through our automated dialing platform, manage high call volumes, and report outcomes accurately within our internal systems. Full campaign training is provided. What we need from you is the work ethic, adaptability, and communication skills to execute.



What You'll Do

Handle 300-350 outbound calls per day using our automated dialing software

Adapt quickly across multiple client campaigns, each with its own script, targets, and objectives

Complete full training for each campaign before going live which we provide

Log and report all call outcomes accurately within our CRM/tracking systems

Meet daily conversion targets set per campaign

Maintain professional, clean language in all client-facing interactions



Schedule

Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time

(9:30 PM – 6:00 AM Philippine Time — night shift availability required)



Compensation

$7.00–$9.00 USD per hour based on experience, plus night shift differential

Performance bonuses for reps who consistently exceed daily conversion targets

Immediate start for qualified candidates



Requirements



Experience & Skills

Prior outbound calling, BPO, or inside sales experience strongly preferred

Comfortable switching between multiple campaigns and client contexts

Strong, professional English — clear articulation, no heavy filler language

Highly organized with accurate and timely data entry habits

Dependable attendance — consistent daily presence is non-negotiable

Available to start immediately



Equipment You Must Have

Personal computer or laptop capable of running dialing software smoothly

Reliable internet connection

Quality headset or earbuds with noise cancellation

Quiet, dedicated home workspace free from background noise



Equipment will not be provided. Please do not apply if you do not currently meet all equipment requirements.



Why Join Us

Competitive USD hourly rate paid consistently

Night shift differential pay included

Clear performance bonus structure, exceed targets, earn more

Full training is provided on every campaign

Stable, long-term role with a growing team



To Apply

Submit your resume along with a brief voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and describing your outbound sales experience. Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: Management Accountant
description:
Title: Management Accountant 

Salary: £24,00.00 per annum

Contract: Permanent



ABOUT US



Williams, Stanley & Co is a leading accountancy firm catering to a diverse range of clients in the hospitality industry, from high street chains to family-run cafes. Our company began with a mission to provide accurate and actionable financial insights to businesses, drawing from our founders’ own experiences in managing multiple rapidly growing ventures.



Driven by a commitment to customer-first accounting, we’ve assembled a team of experienced and trusted accountants who share our vision for excellence. With a strong emphasis on collaboration and expertise, our team operates seamlessly across different locations, including the UK, Philippines, Dubai and South Africa. 



ABOUT YOU:



Reporting to the Senior Management Accountant, the management accountant will be responsible for management accounting within our practice, specifically for our UK-based clients. This role requires the ability to liaise with and build strong relationships with both our US and UK clients. 



You will have the opportunity to interact with senior stakeholders, clients, and our leadership team, providing valuable exposure and experience. This role is designed for someone who is eager to mentor, develop and leave a lasting impact on our team and company. As we grow and continually enhance our client offerings, you will play a key role in driving these improvements, shaping the future of our practice, and advancing your own professional development. 



You are: 



• Experienced in a similar role with a strong accounting skillset and previous staff management/supervisory experience.

• Familiar with the hospitality industry, either in the practice or industry.

• Resilient and possess leadership style that emphasises leading from the front. 

• Eager to develop and be part of a fast-growing national practice.

• Capable of communicating effectively and partnering with Senior Management and other departments. 

• Fully versed with 4-4-5 reporting.

• Proficient in advanced Excel skills; experience with Xero is advantageous. 





RESPOSIBILITIES



• Supervise and assist with the completion of monthly management accountants and client meetings.

• Produce board packs for monthly management meetings.

• Manage a team of Management Account Assistants and Bookkeepers, and mentor new team members and direct reports.

• Supervise the bookkeeping function.

• Reconcile balance sheets at month-end, including bank and inter-company reconciliations, resolving discrepancies as necessary. 

• Produce and post monthly journals. 

• Maintain fixed asset registers for clients. 

• Prepare information for annual corporation tax schedules and assist the tax team. 

• Produce monthly and quarterly VAT returns/reconciliations.

• Assist with budget preparation.

• Assist with statutory audits and audit information across teams and disciplines. 

• Translate raw data into meaningful analytics and provide insights and advice for clients with varying levels of financial literacy. 

• Regularly communicate with clients management to provide accurate reporting data and implement solutions to improve profitability and efficiency. 

• Take ownership off accounting functions, ensuring all books are properly maintained and internal controls are in place for financial reporting accuracy and efficiency. 

• Advice clients on action plans during periods of limited cash flow. 

• Liaise with accountants to finalise year-end reporting or tax returns on behalf of clients. 

• Ensure all deliverables, including monthly accounts, audit packs, and other relevant reports, are delivered on time and in accordance with agreed SLA’s.

• Advise clients on the data within management accounts, educating them on using the information to drive decisions and strategies. 

• Maintain regular communication with clients to ensure continuous value addition.

• Act as a financial adviser to clients, offering support and advice for their business and decisions. 

• Prepare forecasts and budget for clients. 

• Review and maintain the aged debtors and creditors reports weekly, ensuring overdue balances are followed up and flagged to management, and process payment runs per agreed payment terms.

• Coordinate information flow between our back-office and clients.

title: Instagram Content Creator & Growth VA for Australian Slow Fashion Brand
description:
We are an Australian handcrafted crochet fashion brand. Every piece is made by hand by women artisans in Argentina. We sell premium slow fashion online and are expanding into boutique stockists across Australia.



We are looking for a creative, Instagram-savvy VA who can take ownership of our Instagram growth, from raw photos to published posts, engagement, and strategy. This is not a basic scheduling role. We need someone who understands fashion aesthetics, knows how Instagram's algorithm works, and can make our feed look beautiful and grow our following consistently.



What you'll own:

You will edit and prepare raw photos into polished, on-brand Instagram posts using images we provide. You will write captions in our brand voice, warm, minimal, and authentic slow fashion tone. You will design text slides and carousel posts in Canva using our brand colours and fonts. You will schedule and publish 3 to 4 posts per week via Meta Business Suite. You will do daily engagement, 15 to 20 genuine comments on target hashtags and accounts. You will reply to comments and DMs within a few hours. You will research trending audio for Reels. You will send a weekly report covering follower growth, best performing post, and engagement rate.



What we provide:

We will give you raw photos from a professional photoshoot, brand colours, fonts and logo files, a content calendar with post themes and directions, caption review and approval before posting, and a full creative brief and brand guidelines.



Requirements:

We are looking for someone with proven experience growing an Instagram account for a fashion, lifestyle, or e-commerce brand. Please include examples or a portfolio with your application. You must have a strong eye for fashion aesthetics — your edits must look premium, not generic. Excellent written English with a natural, non-robotic tone is essential. You must be proficient in Canva and Meta Business Suite, familiar with Instagram algorithm, hashtag strategy and Reels best practices, reliable, proactive, and a clear communicator. Manual engagement only — no bots or automation tools.



Hours: 10–15 hours per week

Budget: USD $150–250 per month

Start: Immediately



To apply:

Please send 2 to 3 Instagram accounts you have managed or grown with results if possible. Include one example post you would create for a slow fashion brand with caption and hashtags. Tell us your favourite slow fashion Instagram account and why you like it. Include your availability and timezone.

title: Packaging Designer
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand selling on Bol.com, focused on building high-quality, standout consumer products. Our mission is simple: create premium brands that customers trust, love, and reorder. Packaging plays a critical role in that experience — and that’s where you come in.



The Role



We’re looking for a top-performing Packaging Designer who understands that packaging is more than just design — it’s conversion, branding, and customer experience combined. You will be responsible for creating visually compelling, high-quality packaging that elevates our products and strengthens our brand presence online and offline.



This is not a basic design role — we want someone who thinks strategically, moves fast, and delivers at a high level.



Key Responsibilities



-Design premium packaging for new and existing products (boxes, labels, inserts, etc.)

-Translate brand identity into high-converting, visually appealing packaging

-Ensure packaging aligns with Bol.com marketplace standards and customer expectations

-Collaborate with product, marketing, and sourcing teams

-Prepare print-ready files and work with suppliers/manufacturers

-Continuously improve designs based on customer feedback, reviews, and performance data

-Stay ahead of trends in e-commerce packaging and branding



Requirements:



-Proven experience as a Packaging Designer (portfolio required)

-Strong skills in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop (InDesign is a plus)

-Experience with print production and packaging dielines

-Strong understanding of branding, typography, and visual hierarchy

-Ability to design for conversion, not just aesthetics

-Experience in e-commerce (Amazon, Bol.com, Shopify brands) is a big plus

-Detail-oriented, fast, and able to meet deadlines



What We’re Looking For:



-Someone who thinks like a brand owner, not just a designer

-High standards — you care about quality and details

-Proactive and performance-driven mindset

-Ability to take feedback and iterate quickly

-Strong communicator and team player

-Nice to Have

-Experience with product photography direction

-Knowledge of packaging materials and sustainability

-Experience working with Asian manufacturers



What We Offer:



-Work with a fast-growing premium e-commerce brand

-High ownership and creative freedom

-Competitive compensation

-Opportunity to build and shape strong consumer brands

-Long-term growth potential

title: Video Editor & Animator – Dream Body Fitness App
description:
We're building Dream Body, a fast-growing fitness app, and we're looking for a part-time video editor and animator who lives and breathes Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro. You'll be creating eye-catching animated motion graphics that elevate our social content across TikTok and Instagram.



This is a part-time role at around 15–20 hours per week, fully remote, with the potential to grow as we scale.



What you'll do

You'll create animated motion graphics for our short-form social content — think dynamic text animations, branded visual effects, animated overlays, and scroll-stopping transitions. Working from creative briefs provided by our team, you'll bring concepts to life with polished motion design that feels native to social platforms. As we grow, you'll also help us build out a library of reusable motion templates to keep our output consistent and efficient at volume.



What we're looking for

We need someone with strong skills in After Effects and Premiere Pro -  this is the core of the role, so you should be confident working across both. Experience creating motion graphics for social content is essential, and we'd love to see examples in your portfolio. You should be comfortable working to a brief, delivering clean files on time, and iterating quickly based on feedback. 



What we offer

You'll get clear briefs, an organised workflow, and a reliable volume of work each week. This is a genuine long-term opportunity with a team that's easy to work with. 



To apply

Send us your portfolio or showreel with examples of motion graphics and animation work, particularly anything created for social platforms.

title: Freelance Social Media Strategist & VA
description:
We produce long-form content on YouTube — strategy breakdowns, founder war stories, and technology frameworks built for operators making high-stakes decisions. Your job is to take that content and build a consistent, high-impact presence across LinkedIn, TikTok, and Meta.

This is a strategic role, not an execution-only role. We already have a video editor. What we need is someone who understands what lands on each platform, can prompt AI video clipping tools to pull the right moments, write captions that match the platform culture, and make smart recommendations about what to push and when.

The goal is simple: turn one YouTube video per week into a content engine that wins consulting clients.





What You'll Do

Own the monthly content calendar across LinkedIn, TikTok, and Meta — including planning, scheduling, and execution

Use AI video clipping tools (Opus Clip, Descript, or similar) to identify and extract the strongest moments from YouTube videos using script-based prompts

Recommend which clips to prioritise for each platform — understanding that what works on LinkedIn (credibility, depth) is different from TikTok (hooks, speed) and Meta (reach, relatability)

Write platform-native captions in the CDT Digital voice: direct, outcome-focused, zero fluff

Monitor engagement and respond to comments in a way that represents the brand well

Track performance metrics (reach, engagement, follower growth, link clicks) and surface insights — not just numbers

Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) to assist with caption drafts and content ideas — and apply sharp editorial judgement to the output

Flag content opportunities: trending conversations, founder events, industry moments worth jumping on





Who You Are

The right person for this role understands that LinkedIn, TikTok, and Meta are three different environments requiring three different approaches — and can articulate why without being asked. Specifically:

You have managed social media for a B2B brand, consultant, or executive — not just lifestyle or ecom

You can look at a 45-minute YouTube video and tell us which three moments will perform best on LinkedIn versus TikTok, and explain your reasoning

You are fluent with AI tools — you use them to move faster, but your judgement is what makes the output good

You are proactive: you bring ideas, flag risks, and make recommendations rather than waiting to be told what to do next

Your written English is clean, punchy, and free of marketing clichés

You are reliable with deadlines and communicate clearly when anything shifts





Nice to Have

Familiarity with SaaS, startups, or the technology consulting space

Hands-on experience with Opus Clip, Descript, Munch, or similar AI video clipping tools

Experience with scheduling and analytics tools: Buffer, Later, Metricool, or similar

Ability to create basic AI-generated social ads using tools like AdCreative.ai or Canva AI — this is a nice-to-have now but will become a core part of the role as we scale

Understanding of what drives reach on LinkedIn for thought leadership content specifically





Where This Role Goes

We are building a content machine to support two businesses: CDT Digital (consulting) and a second venture focused on AI-powered application development. As that machine grows, so does this role. The person who takes this seriously — brings strategy, not just execution — has a clear path into a Head of Content or Marketing Lead position as the team scales.





How to Apply

Send a short message — not a template — that tells us three things: what B2B brand or executive you have managed social media for; one example of a content decision you made that was platform-specific and why it worked; and which AI tools you currently use in your workflow.

Applications that do not address all three will not be reviewed. We are looking for someone who reads briefs carefully and executes precisely — so the application is your first demonstration of that.

title: FACEBOOK ADS VIDEO EDITOR
description:

We’re a fast-growing Beauty e-commerce company on a mission to impact as many people as possible in the European market.

We’re currently looking for a talented Ads Video Editor to join our team.



In this role, you’ll be responsible for turning raw footage, scripts, and creative ideas into high-performing video ads for platforms like
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.



Your work will directly influence our ability to grab attention, improve conversion rates, reduce CPA, and scale winning campaigns. You won’t just be editing videos — you’ll be helping build the growth engine of the business.

We’re looking for someone ambitious, proactive, and hungry to improve. If you want a role where your work actually matters and where performance is valued, this could be the right fit.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Editing direct-response video ads designed to convert

Transforming raw footage, UGC clips, voiceovers, and scripts into polished ad creatives

Creating multiple variations of winning ads for testing

Improving hooks, pacing, retention, and overall watch time

Adding captions, motion graphics, sound design, and visual effects where needed

Collaborating with the marketing team to turn performance insights into better creatives

Staying up to date with ad trends, competitor creatives, and what’s working on social media



What We’re Looking For:

What You’ll Need to Bring to the Table:

Strong experience editing video ads, not just aesthetic content

Good understanding of direct-response marketing

Experience with
, Instagram, TikTok, or YouTube ads

Ability to identify strong hooks, fast pacing, and retention-focused editing

Solid sense of storytelling, emotion, and sales psychology

Ability to produce multiple creative variations quickly

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage deadlines

Clear communication and reliability

A mindset focused on growth, improvement, and performance



Nice to Have:

Experience in e-commerce or performance marketing

Experience editing UGC-style ads

Knowledge of what makes a creative perform based on metrics like CTR, hook rate, hold rate, and conversion rate

Basic motion design skills

Experience analyzing competitors’ ad creatives



Company Values:

We move fast

We care about performance

We take ownership

We communicate clearly

We stay coachable and always look for ways to improve



What’s In It For You:

Competitive salary + performance-based bonuses

The chance to work on creatives that actually scale

Real ownership and autonomy

Fast learning and growth opportunities

A team that values initiative, creativity, and results

The opportunity to be part of a growing company with big goals



Ready to Apply?

If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we’d love to hear from you.

Apply here:

title: Calling Agent

Close the deal

Collect 50?vance payment

Monthly payments

Number:

title: Marketing & Communications Associate
description:
Long Island Select Healthcare is a Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC) based in Suffolk County, New York, serving over 8,500 patients annually across multiple locations. We provide comprehensive primary care, behavioral health, dental, and specialty services to individuals and families across Long Island, including a significant population of individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities (IDD).



We are seeking a highly skilled, detail-oriented, and self-motivated Marketing & Communications Associate to support our Director of Marketing & Development. This is a full-time remote position requiring availability during Eastern Time business hours. The ideal candidate brings exceptional English writing skills, strong creative instincts, and proven proficiency across graphic design, video production, digital marketing, and content strategy.



This role is fast-paced, high-output, and mission-driven. You will work directly with the Director and, when authorized, with internal staff and external partners including vendors, sponsors, legislators, and media contacts. Healthcare experience is a plus, but drive, precision, and creativity are non-negotiable.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:

Content & Copywriting



Draft, edit, and proofread marketing copy for social media,
 campaigns, web pages, press releases, donor communications, sponsorship materials, and event collateral

Write long-form content including newsletter articles, blog posts, grant narrative support, and community health education pieces

Adapt tone and voice for multiple audiences: patients, donors, corporate sponsors, government stakeholders, and the general public

Maintain brand voice consistency across all written materials



Graphic Design



Design print and digital materials including flyers, brochures, signage, event materials, social media graphics,
 headers, sponsor decks, and presentation slides

Proficient in Canva (required); Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) strongly preferred

Execute design briefs from concept through final production-ready file

Resize and adapt designs across formats and platforms



Video Production & Editing



Produce, edit, and export short-form video content for social media (Instagram Reels,
, YouTube Shorts)

Edit raw footage, add captions, music, text overlays, and branding elements

Support creation of patient testimonial videos, event recap content, and promotional campaigns

Comfortable working with tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or equivalent



Digital Marketing



Assist with scheduling and publishing content across
, Instagram, LinkedIn, and other platforms

Support Google Ads and Meta Ads campaign monitoring, reporting, and asset creation

Pull performance reports from Google Analytics 4, Meta Ads Manager, and other platforms

Help manage and update website content as directed



Event & Campaign Support



Provide comprehensive support for the organization's annual fundraising events, including the 1st Annual Benefit Golf Classic (August 2026) and other signature events

Assist with sponsor outreach tracking, sponsor packet assembly, landing page updates, and logistics coordination

Build and maintain event timelines, checklists, and project management entries in Monday.com and/or Asana

Support logistics coordination for community outreach events, ribbon cuttings, and public-facing activities



Development & Fundraising Support



Assist with donor communications, acknowledgment letters, and stewardship materials

Support capital campaign and annual giving efforts with design and copy assets

Help maintain donor and sponsor tracking records in HubSpot CRM

Research grant opportunities and assist with narrative drafting when directed



Administrative & Project Management



Manage and update project boards in Monday.com and Asana

Maintain organized digital asset libraries (logos, photos, templates, documents)

Track deadlines and flag deliverables proactively

Prepare meeting agendas, notes, and follow-up summaries when needed

Communicate professionally with internal staff and approved external contacts on behalf of the Director



Marketing Strategy



Contribute to the development and execution of marketing plans for service line promotions, patient acquisition campaigns, and community outreach initiatives

Assist in identifying target audiences, messaging strategies, and channel selection for campaigns across digital and print

Support tracking and reporting on campaign performance metrics including reach, engagement, patient inquiry volume, and cost per acquisition

Research competitor positioning, community health trends, and demographic data to inform strategic recommendations

Help develop content calendars, campaign timelines, and go-to-market plans for new programs, locations, and events



TO APPLY:

Please submit all of the following. Incomplete applications will not be considered.



Resume or CV -- current, detailed, and in English

Cover letter -- written in English, explaining your interest in this role and summarizing your most relevant experience. This is how we assess written communication quality. Templated or generic letters will be disqualified.

Portfolio -- links to samples of your graphic design and video editing work. Work must be your own.

DISC Personality Assessment -- complete the free assessment at the link below and include your results (screenshot or summary) with your application. This is required and non-negotiable.



DISC Assessment Link: https://www.truity.com/test/disc-personality-test

We are looking for a collaborative, detail-oriented, and driven individual who communicates clearly and thrives in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment. Your DISC profile helps us understand how you work, communicate, and handle pressure -- there is no right or wrong result.



Availability confirmation: Please state in your application that you are available Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM Eastern Time. Applications that do not confirm availability will not be reviewed.



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:



Excellent written and spoken English -- this is a strict requirement; your application must demonstrate it

Minimum 2 years of experience in marketing, communications, or a related field

Strong graphic design portfolio demonstrating professional-quality work

Demonstrated video editing experience with sample work available

Proficiency in Canva (required) and Adobe Creative Suite (strongly preferred)

Experience with social media management and content scheduling tools

Familiarity with Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager, or similar platforms

Comfortable working in project management tools (Monday.com, Asana, or equivalent)

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple deadlines simultaneously

Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

Reliable internet connection and a professional home office setup

Availability strictly during Eastern Time hours (8:00 AM to 4:00 PM ET, Monday through Friday)



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS (Nice to Have):



Experience working with U.S.-based nonprofit organizations, healthcare providers, or community health centers

Familiarity with Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs), New York State health systems, or healthcare marketing compliance

Experience with HubSpot CRM

Knowledge of HIPAA basics as it relates to marketing and patient communications

Experience supporting fundraising events, donor relations, or grant writing

title: Funnelish Funnel Builder — Copy, Rebrand & Translate Competitor Advertorials (Daily Work)
description:
BUDGET: $15 USD per funnel | 7 days a week (Past experience with proof is needed)



---



ABOUT THE ROLE

--------------

I run a dropshipping business selling health and skincare products in Portugal. I need a funnel builder who can take

competitor advertorials and product pages, rebrand them to my brand and

colors, translate them into the target language, and publish them — fast.



This is a 7-days-a-week ongoing role. If you are reliable and fast,

you will have consistent daily work with me long-term.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO EACH TIME

---------------------
. I send you a competitor advertorial/product page URL

2. You study the layout, structure and copy style

3. You use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to:

   - Translate it into the target language (Portuguese)

   - Rebrand all product names, brand names and claims to my brand

   - Rebrand all product images to match our branding

4. You rebuild the page in Funnelish

  5. You apply my brand colors, fonts and logo throughout

6. You deliver a live preview link within 48 hours



Each funnel = 1 advertorial page + 1 product/order page.



---



WHAT I PROVIDE

---------------

- Competitor reference URLs for each funnel

- My brand name, logo, colors and product images

- Product details and any specific claims to include or avoid

- Fast feedback — I will review and approve within 24 hours



---



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR

---------------------

? MUST HAVE Past Experience building advertorial-style pages (the "article that sells" format)

? Comfortable using AI tools to rewrite and translate copy

? MUST HAVE Experience with Funnelish

? Can match the look and feel of a reference page closely

? Reliable — available 7 days a week, responds within a few hours

? Fast — 48-hour turnaround per funnel is the expectation

? Good eye for design — pages must look professional and trustworthy



---



TO APPLY — ANSWER THESE 5 QUESTIONS

--------------------------------------

Applications without answers to all 5 questions will be ignored.



1. How long have you been using Funnelish?

2. Have you built advertorial/pre-lander pages before?

   Share 2 live examples or screenshots.

3. Have you used AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) for copywriting or

   translation?

4. Can you work 7 days a week and deliver within 48 hours per funnel?

5. Leave your number in this format +?6?3?1?2?3?4?5?6?7?8

---



RATE: $15 USD per complete funnel (advertorial + product page)

TYPE: Full-time ongoing, 7 days a week

HOURS: Flexible — async communication is fine, but fast responses expected

START: Immediately

title: Vehicle Wrap Graphic Designer — Adobe Illustrator Expert (Part-Time, Growing to Full-Time)
description:
About Us

 Summit Wraps and Graphics is a vehicle wrap and branding company based in Utah, USA. We do full wraps, partial wraps, decals, fleet graphics, and commercial branding for businesses of all sizes. We're growing fast and need a talented designer to join our team.



The Role

We're looking for a graphic designer who lives and breathes Adobe Illustrator. Your primary job is creating professional vehicle wrap mockups — taking a client's brand (logo, colors, messaging) and turning it into a stunning design laid out on vehicle templates.



You'll work closely with our team through our CRM system (GoHighLevel) and Slack. Jobs will come to you through our pipeline — you'll receive the client info, create mockup options, send proofs for approval, make revisions, and prepare production-ready files.



  What You'll Do

  - Design vehicle wrap mockups (full wraps, partial wraps, decals, fleet graphics)

  - Work with vehicle templates to create realistic mockups for client approval

  - Take client feedback and make revisions quickly

  - Prepare print-ready files with proper bleed, panel layout, and cut lines

  - Communicate with clients through our CRM to present designs and collect feedback

  - Organize design files and maintain our template library

  - Occasional marketing graphics (social media, ads, proposals) as needed



  Must-Have Skills

  - Expert-level Adobe Illustrator (this is non-negotiable — you'll use it daily)

  - Strong understanding of print design (CMYK, bleed, resolution, large format)

  - Clean, professional design aesthetic — especially bold commercial/industrial styles

  - Ability to work with vehicle templates and understand how designs wrap around 3D surfaces

  - Excellent English communication (you'll interact with clients)

  - Reliable internet connection and availability during US business hours (Mountain Time) for at

  least a few overlapping hours

  - Responsive — we value fast communication and quick turnaround



  Preferred Skills (Big Plus)

  - Vehicle wrap or signage industry experience

  - Knowledge of RIP software (VersaWorks) and cutting software (Graphtec Studio)

  - Adobe Photoshop proficiency

  - Canva and/or Figma experience

  - Experience with CRM systems (GoHighLevel or similar)

  - Understanding of vinyl materials, laminates, and installation considerations



  About the Position

  - Part-time to start: approximately 20 hours/week

  - Compensation: $4-6/hr USD depending on experience (paid weekly or bi-weekly)

  - Schedule: Flexible, but must have overlap with US Mountain Time for communication

  - Growth: As our workload increases, this role will grow to full-time with a pay increase

  - Long-term: We're looking for someone to grow with us, not a one-off freelancer



  What Success Looks Like

  - You receive a job brief (business name, logo, colors, phone, website, vehicle type)

  - Within 24-48 hours, you deliver 2-3 professional mockup options

  - Client picks one, you make revisions within a few hours

  - Final file is print-ready and organized properly

  - You communicate clearly at every step — no disappearing acts



  To Apply

  1. Send your portfolio with at least 3 examples of vehicle wrap designs OR large format

  print/signage work

  2. Tell us about your Illustrator experience — how many years, what type of projects

  3. What is your availability and preferred working hours?

  4. What is your expected hourly rate in USD?

title: UI/UX Design & System Architecture for Advanced CRM Platform
description:
We are building a modern, scalable CRM platform similar to tools like Workiz and Salesforce, tailored for service-based businesses (locksmith, field services, etc.).



The system will include customer management, communication (calls/SMS), job tracking, invoicing, and real-time activity monitoring.



We are looking for a high-level UI/UX Designer + Product Architect who can design both:



A clean, intuitive interface (web + mobile)

A scalable system structure (UX flows + architecture thinking)

???? Scope of Work

1. UI/UX Design

Design a modern, clean CRM dashboard

Create full user flows:

Customer management

Job/work order management

SMS/chat interface

Call logs & recordings

Payments & invoices

Design for:

Desktop (primary)

Mobile responsive

Create:

Wireframes (low + high fidelity)

Final UI screens (Figma or similar)

Design system (colors, components, typography)

2. UX Strategy & Product Thinking

Define user journeys for:

Admin

Dispatcher

Technician

Optimize for:

Speed (few clicks to complete actions)

Real-time usage (live calls, updates)

Suggest improvements based on existing CRMs (like Workiz)

3. System Architecture (High-Level)



We are NOT looking for deep backend coding, but we DO need:



System structure planning:

Modules (CRM, calls, messaging, payments)

User roles & permissions

Data flow diagrams:

How calls/SMS integrate

How jobs move through pipeline

Recommendations for:

Tech stack (frontend/backend)

Scalable infrastructure (multi-user system)

4. Features to Design

Dashboard (KPIs, live activity)

Customer profiles

Job scheduling & dispatch board

Chat/SMS system (like iMessage style)

Call system (logs + recordings)

Invoice & payment screen

Notifications system

???? Requirements

Proven experience designing CRM / SaaS platforms

Strong portfolio (preferably similar systems)

Experience with tools like:

Figma

Adobe XD (optional)

Understanding of UX for real-time systems

Bonus:

Experience with VoIP / communication platforms

Experience with field-service businesses

???? Deliverables

Full UI/UX design (Figma file)

Wireframes + final screens

Design system

User flows & diagrams

High-level system architecture documentation

???? Ideal Candidate



We’re looking for someone who:



Thinks like a product owner, not just a designer

Can simplify complex systems

Understands how CRM businesses actually operate

Can build something better than existing platforms, not just copy

???? Goal



To create a powerful, scalable, and easy-to-use CRM that can support 1000+ users, real-time communication, and future expansion.

title: Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist (Remote)
description:
We are hiring an Inbound Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist to handle warm inbound homeowner leads from people actively searching online to sell their homes.



This role exists to filter, qualify, or disqualify leads before they ever reach our acquisition team.



This is not sales, not cold calling, and not persuasion.



If you are comfortable asking direct questions, enforcing clear criteria, and ending calls professionally when a lead is not a fit, this role may be right for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



Respond to warm inbound homeowner inquiries (no cold calling)



Conduct structured qualification calls using a clear scorecard



Ask direct questions about:



motivation



timeline



property condition



decision-maker status



price expectations



Apply qualification rules consistently



Disqualify early when criteria are not met (this is considered success)



Transfer only clean, well-qualified opportunities to acquisitions



Document outcomes clearly in the CRM



You are evaluated on decision quality and discipline, not call volume.



Work Schedule & Availability (Important)



This role requires full-day availability, not just total hours.



Typical schedule:



4–5 hours work



2-hour break



4–5 hours work



Leads come in throughout the day and require timely follow-up.



This role is not suitable if you need a fragmented or flexible schedule.



Who This Role Is For



You may be a strong fit if you:



Are comfortable asking direct questions



Can say “no” calmly and professionally



Prefer clear rules over improvisation



Stay emotionally steady on calls



Document accurately and follow SOPs



Work well independently in a remote environment



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is likely not a fit if you:



Are looking for a sales or commission-heavy role



Prefer persuasion over qualification



Dislike enforcing rules



Want flexibility instead of structure



Feel uncomfortable disqualifying friendly sellers



Preferred DISC Tendencies (Not Required, but Helpful)



Moderate Dominance (comfortable leading conversations)



Low–moderate Influence (professional, not sales-driven)



Moderate Steadiness (calm, patient)



Moderate Compliance (respects rules and processes)



High-pressure sales personalities are not a fit.



What We Offer



100% remote role



Consistent warm inbound leads



Clear SOPs, scorecards, and expectations



Stable, long-term opportunity for the right fit



Professional, process-driven team environment



How to Apply



Please include a short answer to this question with your application:



“When would you disqualify a seller who sounds friendly but does not meet your criteria?”



Final Note



We are building a disciplined qualification system, not a sales operation.

The right person will value clarity, consistency, and clean decision-making.

title: AI Copywriter & Content Systems Builder - B2B Pre-Call Sales Copy (Direct Response + Claude)
description:
Summary

We're hiring our first AI-native copywriter at Preclose.ai - a B2B consultancy that's generated $11M+ in closed revenue for clients by fixing the "72-hour dead zone" between when prospects book sales calls and actually show up.



This isn't blog writing. This isn't social media captions. This is conversion copy inside a revenue system that clients pay $10K+/month for.



You'll operate a 6-phase intelligence-to-copy workflow:



- Analyze 15–20 sales call transcripts and extract verbatim customer language, objection patterns, and buying triggers (prompts included)

- Build pre-call
 sequences, iMessage/SMS flows, no-show recovery, reactivation sequences, and sales enablement assets

- Use Claude Projects and prompt chains to multiply your output - not replace your judgment

- Write content for Preclose itself that attracts B2B operators doing $5M+ (X, LinkedIn)

- Track performance data (open rates, reply rates, show rates) and iterate copy based on what's actually working



See the attached job posting for full details on the role, system, and what we're looking for.



What you'll produce (per client engagement):



- 5+
 sequences (confirmation, value, reminder, no-show, reactivation)

- 9–13 iMessage/SMS touchpoints with branching logic

- Response banks for live sales conversations

- Setter playbooks and objection handling frameworks

- VSL scripts, landing page copy, sales decks

- Master Intelligence Documents compiled from transcript analysis



You're a fit if:

- You've written
 sequences with real performance stats (not just "I wrote
s")

- You understand direct response principles - hooks, mechanisms, proof, awareness levels

- You've built AI workflows (prompt chains, automation systems) that produced real output

- You can read a sales call transcript and pull the 3 phrases that should be in every

- You think in systems, not just sentences

- You're comfortable in an early-stage environment (team of 3) where you own outcomes



You're NOT a fit if:

- You write "content" but have never written copy that had to convert

- You use AI to generate first drafts and ship them without heavy editing

- You think good writing = grammatically perfect (we care about persuasion)

- You need daily direction on what to do



About us:



Preclose.ai fixes the gap nobody owns - the 72 hours between booking and showing up. Our clients see show rates jump from 40% to 75%+, close rates improve 20%+, and sales cycles shorten because prospects arrive pre-educated. We work with B2B software companies, agencies, and consultants doing $5M+ annually.



Team of 3. Fully remote. You'd report directly to the founder.

To apply:



- Send a brief note on why this role interests you

- Share 1–2 examples of copy you've written that had measurable results 
 sequences, landing pages, sales copy - anything with numbers)- Bonus: Show us an AI workflow or prompt system you've built
