title: Founding Product Builder (AI + Behavioral Design)
description:
About Us



We’re building an app designed to solve a real problem:



Most women feel stuck, unclear on what they’re good at, and disconnected from what they actually enjoy.



This app helps them figure it out through action, not overthinking.



Users start with a short, psychology-driven quiz that identifies strengths, interests, and patterns. From there, AI generates personalized, real-world experiments they can try immediately to discover what actually fits them.



This is not a journaling app.

This is a clarity-through-action system.



The Role

We’re looking for a Founding Product Builder to take this from idea ? live app.

You won’t just be coding. You’ll be shaping the product, challenging assumptions, and building something people actually use.

If you need detailed instructions for everything, this is not your role.



What You’ll Build

A high-converting onboarding quiz that identifies:

Strengths

Energy drivers

Skill patterns

AI-powered recommendations that:

Turn insights into tiny, testable experiments

Adapt based on user behavior and feedback

A feedback loop that tracks:

What users try

What they enjoy

What they avoid

A simple, engaging user experience that keeps people coming back



Responsibilities

Build and launch the MVP quickly

Design and implement AI-driven personalization

Collaborate on product strategy and user experience

Continuously improve the system based on user data

Push for simplicity, speed, and real user outcomes



Requirements:

Experience building consumer-facing apps

Strong product thinking (not just technical execution)

Experience working with AI APIs (like OpenAI or similar)

Ability to work in ambiguity and move fast

Bias toward action over perfection



Nice to Have

Experience with behavioral psychology or habit-building products

Experience building early-stage or 0 ? 1 products

Opinions on why most “self-discovery” apps fail

title: YouTube Editor / Producer
description:
Here's the job description, ready to post:



Video Editor — MMG Studio (Contract / Freelance)

Location: Remote (Columbus, OH based company)

Type: Hourly

Compensation: Based on experience and scope



About MMG Studio

MMG Studio is a healthcare-focused web design and lead generation agency based in Columbus, OH. We work with marketing directors, agency partners, and founders inside $2-10M companies navigating real marketing challenges in regulated industries.

Our content exists to educate, build trust, and position MMG as the clearest voice in a noisy space. We are not a hype channel. We are not a trend studio. We speak to people who are smart, busy, and skeptical.



About the Role

We're looking for a video editor who can deliver polished, on-brand video content across long-form YouTube videos, short-form clips, and podcast-style edits. You'll receive raw footage, a brand guide, and clear direction. Your job is to turn that into something calm, clean, and credible.



Our audience is healthcare marketing directors. They're skeptical, under pressure, and allergic to anything that feels loud or chaotic. If the editing feels like a YouTuber highlight reel, you're not the right fit. If you can make something feel smooth, confident, and purposeful, keep reading.



What You'll Be Editing



Long-form YouTube content (educational, strategy-focused)

Short-form vertical clips for YouTube Shorts and LinkedIn

Podcast-style interview edits

Occasional promotional or explainer videos



What We Expect



Strong hooks in the first 5 to 8 seconds. No slow intros. No "hey guys welcome back." Get to the point.

Moderate pacing. Let ideas land before moving on. No rapid-fire cuts for the sake of energy.

Clean transitions only. Simple cuts and fades. No flashy wipes, slides, or animated gradients.

On-screen text that reinforces the point being made, not decorates it. Bold key phrases, not everything. Five words or fewer per graphic.

Sound design that is subtle and intentional. A light click or whoosh on text is fine. No bass drops, 
 sounds, or audio stingers. Background music sits low and never distracts.



Brand Style at a Glance

You'll receive a full brand guide before starting.



What You Need



Proficiency in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve

Experience editing talking-head and educational content (not just montages or music videos)

The ability to follow a brand guide closely without being asked twice

Clean file management and organized project files

Reliable communication and turnaround times



Bonus Points



Experience editing content in healthcare, B2B, or professional services

Familiarity with YouTube best practices (retention, pacing, thumbnail alignment)

Motion graphics capability for simple lower thirds and text treatments

Comfortable working in Google Drive for file delivery and collaboration

title: YouTube Visual Research Assistant (Find B-Roll & Creative Visual Ideas)
description:
Hello!



I run a YouTube channel and need someone to help find interesting, non-obvious visuals (b-roll, clips, images) to match my scripts.  This is NOT basic research - huge emphasis on visual research!



You will:

- Read short script sections

- Suggest creative visual ideas (not always literal)

- Find real clips/images that match those ideas



Example:



If the script says:

“Two people took a substance and died”



Bad:

- Pills

- Coffins



Good:

- Empty chairs at a table

- Flickering hospital hallway lights

- Abandoned bedroom with sunlight coming through the window



That’s the level of thinking I expect.



What You’ll Do:

- Suggest 2–3 visual ideas per script line

- Find matching clips/images (YouTube, stock, etc.)

- Send links and organize everything clearly (Google Doc or similar)



Requirements:

- Strong visual taste (you can tell what feels interesting vs generic)

- Understand mood, storytelling, and tone

- NOT overly literal thinking 

- Bonus: familiarity with YouTube editing/pacing



Hours & Pay:

- ~15 hrs/week

- $400/month



To apply:



1. Start your application with the word “orange”



2. Answer this:



If the line is "He slowly lost everything," give three (3) different visual ideas that are NOT literal.



3. For EACH idea:

- Include a direct link to a real clip/image you found

- In 1–2 sentences, explain WHY you chose it and how it fits the line



Important:

Do NOT use AI tools for this. I am specifically looking for your personal thinking and taste.

description:
We are looking for a skilled Stake Engine Game Developer to create high-quality, original casino games designed to run on the official Stake Engine platform (the same engine used by studios featured on Stake).



Stake Engine is a powerful Remote Gaming Server (RGS) that allows developers to build, launch, and monetize games inside the Stake ecosystem. We are seeking a developer who can take advantage of this platform to build polished, engaging, and profitable titles.







Responsibilities



Build custom games fully compatible with Stake Engine

Implement game logic, math models, animations, UI, and sound

Integrate assets, reels, paylines, volatility, bonus features, etc.

Ensure smooth performance and responsiveness on web + mobile

Follow Stake Engine documentation and best practices

Work with our team on game concepts, themes, math models, and iteration

Deliver stable builds ready for review, certification, and deployment

Requirements

Experience developing games for Stake Engine or similar RGS frameworks

Strong JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5 Canvas, or Phaser/Unity background

Understanding of casino game design (RTP, house edge, reels, paytables, bonus logic, etc.)

Ability to create polished UI/UX and smooth animations

Knowledge of game math models or willingness to collaborate with a math designer

Portfolio or examples of games you’ve built previously

Compensation



Payment per game (negotiable depending on complexity)



Percentage of game profits (ongoing revenue share)



Long-term collaboration for multiple titles if the first game is successful



Who We're Looking For



Developers who want to build games like those seen from studios such as Twist, Titan, Massive, and Paperclip on the Stake Engine platform—unique, polished, and optimized for player engagement.



If you’ve previously published games on Stake Engine, or if you're familiar with the RGS workflow, you are highly encouraged to apply.

title: Email & SMS Marketing Specialist
description:
We are a fast-growing faith-based fashion brand looking for a highly skilled
 & SMS Marketing Specialist to take full ownership of our lifecycle marketing.



This role is NOT for beginners. We are looking for someone experienced, proactive, and independent — someone who can come in, take initiative, and elevate our
 and SMS strategy without needing constant direction.



Your Responsibilities:

 campaigns (newsletters, product drops, promotions)

• Plan and send SMS campaigns for events, launches, and sales

• Build, optimize, and expand automated flows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, winback, etc.)

 marketing (fashion experience is a plus)

To Apply:

Please include:



1. Examples of
 campaigns/flows you’ve created

 list



We are looking to hire quickly for the right person.

title: Facade Designer / Senior Facade Designer / Drafter
description:
Skytop Engineering is an international facade design and engineering consultancy specializing in the design of all types of building envelope systems.



Our projects span across the Middle East, the UK, North America and Europe, and our clients include leading architects, developers, and facade contractors.



We are building a team of top-tier professionals to match the level of projects we deliver.



We are currently looking for Facade Designers/Drafters to join our growing team and work on unique international projects.



The position is remote (from any country, globally) and offered on a project-by-project basis. Potentially moving to full-time employment.



Immediate start.



This position requires experience in facade design and engineering.

Candidates with primarily architectural backgrounds without strong technical/engineering experience with facade systems will not be considered.



Experience in facade consultancy for Middle East projects (UAE, Saudi Arabia etc.) is a must.



We are particularly interested in candidates with strong AutoCAD skills (required).



Location: Remote (project-based collaboration).



Key Responsibilities



Design of facade systems, including:

Curtain wall systems (stick and unitised)

Ventilated facades

Windows and doors

Glazing systems and building envelope elements

Preparation of technical and working documentation (drawings, details, packages)



Requirements



Experience in construction and facade design

Strong proficiency in AutoCAD (mandatory)

Experience working on Middle East facade consultancy projects (UAE, Saudi Arabia, etc.) is a must

Strong technical thinking and attention to detail

Ability to develop efficient and practical engineering solutions

Self-driven, responsible, and highly motivated



What We Offer



Work on large-scale international projects

Professional development and exposure to advanced engineering practices

A strong team of experienced professionals to learn from

Clear growth opportunities within a fast-developing company

Apply now and join Skytop Engineering!

title: Script Writer - YouTube Script Writer (Conspiracy, Mystery & Viral Storytelling)
description:
Description - We are looking for an experienced YouTube Script Writer who specializes in conspiracy theories, mysteries, and viral storytelling content.



You will be responsible for creating highly engaging, retention-focused scripts similar to popular YouTube channels in the conspiracy, crime, and unexplained niche. Your scripts should hook viewers within the first 10 seconds and keep them watching until the end.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who understands YouTube automation, audience psychology, and viral content structure.



Responsibilities:

Write daily 1–3 hours YouTube scripts (9,00–30,000 words)

Research trending conspiracy theories, mysteries, and viral topics

Create strong hooks, cliffhangers, and engaging storytelling

Structure scripts for high audience retention (fast-paced, no fluff)

Collaborate with editors and voice-over artists

Deliver scripts on time and follow content guidelines

Requirements:

Proven experience writing YouTube scripts (REQUIRED)

Experience in conspiracy, crime, mystery, or documentary-style content

Strong storytelling and research skills

Understanding of YouTube retention strategies

Ability to write in a clear, engaging, and slightly suspenseful tone

Fluent in English

Bonus Skills (Preferred but not required):

Experience with YouTube automation channels

Knowledge of viral content trends

Familiarity with storytelling frameworks (hooks, open loops, pacing)

Pay & Work:

Paid per script (rate depends on experience)

Long-term consistent work available

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling YouTube channel

title: Performance Creatives Video Editor Role
description:
We're ZocialGen, a creative agency that specialises in performance ads for Meta and TikTok.



We're looking for a video editor who can produce high-performing ad creatives - including Pixar/Dreamworks-style 3D animated ads using AI tools.



You've probably seen these viral animated ads on TikTok and Reels - 3D Pixar-style characters, cinematic lighting, short-form vertical video. We produce these at scale for our DTC clients and need someone who already knows how to make them or can pick it up fast.

This role involves:



Creating Pixar/Dreamworks-style 3D animated short-form ads using AI generation tools

Writing prompts for AI image generators and AI video animation tools

Editing and stitching animated clips into polished 9:16 and 4:5 ad creatives

Adding voiceover, captions, and post-production polish in CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci

Working from scripts and reference videos to produce scene-by-scene animated content

Traditional video editing work beyond AI animation (UGC cuts, static ads, etc.)



What we're looking for:



Experience with AI image generation tools (we want to hear which ones you use)

Experience with AI video/animation tools (same — tell us your go-to tools)

Strong eye for cinematic composition, lighting, and Pixar-style aesthetics

Ability to prompt effectively — you understand that the prompt is the craft

Post-production skills: stitching scenes, syncing voiceover, adding captions

Fast turnaround and clear communication



Bonus: experience creating ads or content for DTC/ecommerce brands



This is a part-time / project-based role. We'll start with a trial task to see how you work.



To apply: Please fill out the Google Form linked below. You may find the trial task in the form.





Do NOT apply through OnlineJobs.ph messaging.



Applications are only accepted through the Google Form.

title: Operations & Growth Coordinator (Remote)

???? Success Metrics

You will know you're winning when:

• The founder is no longer the bottleneck 

________________________________________

???? Ideal Candidate

You are:

• Experienced with Go High Level (or similar) 

• Able to manage multiple priorities without dropping the ball 

• Comfortable in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment 

• Interested in growth, leadership, and communication 

________________________________________

???? Work Structure

• Remote (U.S. preferred) 

• EST time zone preferred 

• Part-time or full-time (to start, scalable) 

• Directly reporting to the founder 

________________________________________

Performance bonuses available based on:

• Event execution 

• System implementation

This role can evolve into:

• Integrator (EOS-style)

30 Days

title: Social Media Expert with Google, PPC, SEO and knowledge of marketing on All Social Channels
description:
Job Title: Digital Marketing & SEO Specialist

Location: Work from Home for US Based 20 Year old Corporation

Job Type: Full Time Remote



We have been a commercial printing company for over 20 years. Now a Sign Shop, a Wrap Shop, a Screen-Printing Shop and a Sublimation Manufacturing Company, we are in need of more tea
mbers to take this to the next level.



We are a multi-million-dollar printing company, that specializes in providing high end printed materials and super high end sublimated apparel to companies across the US and several countries.



We are the largest full-service printing company in our area. Our tight-knit culture thrives on hard-working, fun-loving professionals.



We are seeking a passionate and skilled Digital Marketing & SEO Specialist to join our tight-knit team. Our culture thrives on hard work, creativity, and a fun-loving environment, and we’re looking for someone who can contribute to our mission of growing our brand’s visibility and lead generation.



Objective of the Role:

As our Digital Marketing & SEO Specialist, you will be responsible for executing effective digital marketing campaigns that enhance brand awareness, drive qualified leads, and boost conversion metrics. Your expertise in SEO, social media marketing, and digital advertising will be vital in supporting our business objectives.



Key Responsibilities:



    Develop and implement on-page and off-page SEO strategies, including keyword research, metatag optimization, and performance tracking.

    Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns to generate leads and increase online visibility.

    Drive social media marketing efforts across all channels, including
, Instagram, LinkedIn, and more. Experience with influencer partnerships is a plus.

    Utilize Google Analytics to analyze website performance and extract actionable insights.

    Coordinate
 marketing campaigns using MailChimp to engage our audience.

    Maintain and improve our online presence, ensuring consistent branding across all platforms.

    Experience with Social Media CRM integration and marketing automation tools is an advantage.

    Adapt to changing business priorities in a fast-paced environment while maintaining meticulous attention to detail.



Qualifications:

    Proven experience in digital marketing, with a significant focus on SEO and social media strategy.

    Strong understanding of search engine marketing and proficiency in tools like Google Analytics, Google Ads, and relevant SEO software.

    Familiarity with HTML and CSS; additional knowledge in JavaScript is a plus.

    International marketing experience within a globally recognized company is essential.

    Excellent multitasking and organizational skills, demonstrating the ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

    Strong communication skills, capable of engaging with diverse audiences.

    Certifications in Social Media, Google Analytics, or Google Ads will be considered a bonus.

    A portfolio showcasing social media channels and websites you have managed is required.



Who You Are:  

    A stabilizer: Consistent and reliable in your work.

    Detail-oriented: You have an eagle eye for accuracy.

    Organized and systematic: Exceptionally organized and proactive.

    A people person: You thrive on collaboration and interacting with a variety of individuals.



Why Join Us?

This is an exciting opportunity to be part of a dynamic team at a well-established company. If you’re ready to dive into a role where creativity meets results, and you're keen to make an impact, we want to hear from you. 



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume, cover letter, and portfolio to this post. We can't wait to see how you can contribute to our success!

Support

title: Graphic Designer & Canva Specialist
description:
About Simply Media & Co.



About Us

Simply Media & Co. is a strategy-first marketing and communications agency working with healthcare, non-profit, and community-based organizations. We create thoughtful, accessible, and visually compelling materials that support health promotion, community engagement, and real-world impact.

We value clarity, collaboration, and high-quality work over high-volume output.



About the Role

We’re looking for a skilled Graphic Designer with advanced Canva expertise who can take complex content and turn it into clear, engaging, and professional visual materials.

This is not a template-only role—we’re looking for someone who can think critically, work independently, and bring strong design judgment to every project.



Key Responsibilities

Design & Production

• Design a wide range of materials, including: 

o Posters, rack cards, brochures, and reports 

o Social media graphics and campaign assets 

o Presentations and toolkits 

• Translate written content into visually clear, easy-to-understand layouts 

• Maintain brand consistency across multiple client projects 

• Develop Canva templates and organize brand kits 

• Prepare print-ready files (bleeds, margins, resolution, etc.) 

• Manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced environment



What We’re Looking For

• 5-7 years of graphic design experience 

• Advanced Canva skills (required) 

• Strong layout, typography, and visual hierarchy skills 

• Experience designing for both print and digital 

• Ability to work independently with minimal direction 

• Strong attention to detail and organization



Nice to Have

• Healthcare or non-profit experience 

• Adobe Creative Suite experience 

• Knowledge of accessibility (AODA, WCAG) 



Working Style

• Able to manage multiple deadlines across different clients 

• Comfortable working in a collaborative, fast-paced agency environment 

• Some overlap with Eastern Time working hours required 



How to Apply

Please include:

• 3–5 samples of your work (preferably content-heavy designs like reports, posters, or social media campaigns) 

• A short note explaining your role in each project 



*Applications without work samples will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
About Simply Media & Co.

Simply Media & Co. is a strategy-first marketing and communications agency supporting healthcare and community organizations. We create meaningful, accessible content that helps people better understand and navigate their health and wellbeing.



About the Role

, LinkedIn, X)

• Support content calendars and campaign execution 

• Ensure content is clear, accessible, and aligned with client goals 

• Monitor basic performance metrics and suggest improvements 



What We’re Looking For

• 2–4 years of social media or digital marketing experience 

• Strong writing skills (clear, engaging, and adaptable tone) 

• Ability to manage multiple accounts and deadlines 

• Strong Canva skills for content creation 

• Understanding of analytics (Meta, LinkedIn, etc.) 

• Ability to work independently and think creatively 



Nice to Have

• Healthcare, public health, or non-profit experience 

• Experience with short-form video (Reels, TikTok-style) 

• Knowledge of accessibility and plain language writing 



Working Style

• Organized and detail-oriented

*Applications without examples will not be reviewed.

description:
Okay this could be a little confusing but this is why I need outside help to direct me to build my entire brand. Here is the general scope: my Social media is under my personal name and I have built a following there. I was looking to build two businesses at the same time: Manifest by Chans (which will have business courses, ebooks, live webinars, lending for business and private business growth and development mentoring) and Magnum Opus Collective (which will be ebooks, business lending, real estate lending, private money lending, investments and capital raising). 



I have started to built out my beautiful site on Showit, but was going to host the courses, funnels, etc in Kajabi or Gohighlevel. I really need help with someone that can first figure out how best to tie in everything under one site but then link to the different courses and second, help me create these pages and get then up and rolling as fast as possible. I am not sure if this is a scope of work that someone is interested in, but wanted to put it out there. Happy to pay hourly or by project. 



Also, whomever steps up to the plate to do this, I would assume would be great and someone I would love to keep around to help me maintain any and all of the backend work on these sites and customer facing items. 



A bonus if you can take my ideas on branding and create them for me as well.

Thank you!

title: Operations Coordinator / Virtual Assistant (Remote, Part-Time)
description:
Role Overview

We are hiring a detail-oriented, proactive Operations Coordinator to provide remote support across two areas: (1) short-term rental (Airbnb) property operations, and (2) personal administrative and logistics support for a senior finance executive.



This is a part-time role (4 hours/day, 20 hours/week). The ideal candidate operates with minimal supervision, follows documented processes precisely, proactively identifies and resolves gaps, and communicates clearly and concisely. You will not be micromanaged — you will be trusted to execute.



Working Hours

• Eastern Time overlap is required, especially when communicating with housekeepers, vendors, or service providers in the US

• Flexibility to occasionally respond to urgent messages outside core hours is a plus



Part 1: Short-Term Rental Operations

Property Context

• Single Airbnb property with frequent guest turnovers

• 4–7 guest turnovers per month

• Guest messaging partially automated via Hospitable

• A property tablet is used for before/after photos, maintenance requests, and supply refill requests

• Photos sync to Google Photos; requests sync to Google Sheets

• Vendor communication handled through a centralized business number and



Responsibilities — Property Operations

• Confirm cleaner attendance before each scheduled checkout

• Follow up on missing before/after cleaning photos within 2 hours of expected turnover completion

• Review cleaning photos for quality control and flag any issues

• Monitor the Google Sheets supply request log and coordinate refills proactively

• Coordinate maintenance scheduling and basic vendor communication

• Gather 2–3 competitive quotes for non-urgent repairs (under $500 threshold)

• Escalate urgent property issues to the owner immediately

• Handle routine guest messaging not covered by Hospitable automation

• Sending weekly property status summaries every Monday



Part 2: Personal Admin & Logistics Support

Responsibilities — Admin Support

• Track deadlines, follow-ups, and open loops in a shared tracker

• Organize documents and folders in Google Drive per established structure

• Follow up with bills, autopay issues, service providers, lawyers, and administrative items

• Maintain a running open-loop tracker with owners and due dates

• Support travel and appointment logistics: research, shortlist, and summarize options

• Research and shortlist vendors or service providers with structured comparison summaries

• Draft follow-up
s and messages for owner review before sending

• Prepare agendas or briefing notes when requested



Required Skills & Qualities

• Proactive: surfaces solutions, not just problems

• Process-driven: comfortable with SOPs, checklists, and repeatable workflows

• Detail-oriented: catches gaps before they become issues

• Clear communicator: concise written English, responsive during ET hours

• Tech-comfortable: Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Calendar), Hospitable, messaging tools

• Trustworthy and discreet: handles sensitive information with confidentiality

• Experienced in VA or remote operations roles (minimum 2 years preferred)

• Experience supporting property management or Airbnb operations is a strong plus



What We Offer

• Stable part-time role with clear expectations and documented systems

• Opportunity to grow into a broader operational support role

• Work from home with flexible start time within the ET morning window

• Supportive, low-drama environment with a clear principal who values your time

Compensation

Starting Rate: $600 – $700 USD/month (part-time, 20 hours/week)

? 90-Day Performance Review: After your first 90 days, we will conduct a formal review. Strong performers will receive a salary increase to $700 – $750/month. We reward consistency, proactivity, and ownership.

? 13th Month Bonus: We provide a 13th-month bonus paid in December as a thank-you for your commitment and performance over the year.

? Annual raise considered after Year 1, based on performance and scope growth.

? Payment frequency: Weekly for the first two months to build trust; bi-monthly or monthly thereafter by mutual agreement.

title: Video Editor – E-commerce Ads (Health Brand | Scandinavian Market)
description:
JOB TITLE

Video Editor – E-commerce Ads (Health Brand | Scandinavian Market)



JOB DESCRIPTION



Hey, thanks for reading this.

My name is Max. I run a health e-commerce brand. 



We sell health monitoring products across Sweden and Norway, and we're scaling fast into new markets.

I'm looking for a video editor who understands what it takes to make a paid ad actually perform, not just look good, but stop the scroll and convert.



What you'll actually be doing:



Editing short-form video ads for
 and Instagram, primarily 15 to 45 seconds

Taking raw product footage and TikTok-style clips and turning them into clean, high-converting ads

Adding subtitles, text overlays, transitions, and sound design that fits the European health market

Delivering multiple hook variations of the same ad so we can split test

Working at a consistent pace, we need a reliable output, not one great edit per month



What I need from you:



A portfolio or examples of e-commerce ads you've edited, specifically performance ads, not just brand films

You understand what makes someone stop scrolling, pacing, hooks, captions, sound

Experience with European or health-related brands is a strong plus

You're fast, organized, and communicate clearly in English

You can take feedback and implement it without ego



Tools:



Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar, tell us what you use

Trello for task management



How to apply:

Send a short video in English, tell me about yourself, show me 2 to 3 ads you've edited, and explain what you did to make them perform. No examples, no consideration.



Looking forward to seeing your work.

— Max

title: Video Editor / Motion Graphics Editor for YouTube Business Documentary Channel
description:
Job Title:

Senior Video Editor / Motion Graphics Editor for YouTube Business Documentary Channel



Job Description:

Read this entire post carefully before applying.



To be considered, start your application with: PEPSI349



Applications without this word will be ignored immediately.



I am launching a serious YouTube channel called “Brand Misfire,” focused on high-quality business documentaries about corporate failures, brand collapses, and major marketing disasters.



I am not looking for a basic editor.

I am not looking for a clip assembler.

I am not looking for someone who only knows simple cuts, memes, gaming edits, or wedding edits.



I am looking for a highly capable long-form YouTube editor who understands:

- documentary storytelling

- cinematic pacing

- motion graphics

- clean infographic design

- strong sound design

- emotional build-up and tension



Reference Channel:

CoreSight YouTube Channel





Reference Videos:







Before applying, you must review the channel and both reference videos.



Only apply if you are genuinely confident that you can create a similar level of:

- pacing

- tension

- visual polish

- motion graphics quality

- storytelling atmosphere

- sound design intensity



If your portfolio does not clearly match this style, please do not apply.



This role requires someone who can take a script and voiceover and turn it into a polished documentary experience — not just a sequence of stock clips.



What I provide:

- fully researched English scripts

- professional AI voiceovers

- clear creative direction

- reference style and expectations

- ongoing work for the right editor



What you will do:

- edit 10–15 minute business documentary videos

- find strong archival / stock footage

- create cinematic motion graphics

- build clean infographic moments

- animate text, charts, numbers, and emphasis elements

- use sound design to create tension, impact, and momentum

- maintain audience retention through strong pacing and visual variation



Required Skills:

- strong long-form YouTube editing ability

- motion graphics experience (After Effects or equivalent)

- excellent sense of pacing and structure

- strong sound design instincts

- good English comprehension

- reliable communication

- ability to match a reference style very closely

- ability to work consistently on weekly deadlines



Budget:

- $100 USD per finished video

- 4 videos per month

- long-term work for the right person



Important:

This budget is fixed for now.

Do not apply if this rate does not work for you.



Paid Test:

I will shortlist only my favorite applicants.

The shortlisted editors will be paid $15 USD to edit the first 60 seconds of an upcoming video.

The editor with the best hook, pacing, visuals, and sound design will get the long-term role.



To apply, send exactly the following:

1. PEPSI349

2. 1 or 2 links only to your best documentary / motion graphics work

3. A short message explaining why you are a strong fit for this exact style

4. Confirmation that you accept:

   - $100 per video

   - the $15 paid test

5. The software you use for editing and motion graphics



Do not send:

- gaming edits

- wedding videos

- travel montages

- unrelated social media edits

- large portfolios with random samples



If you cannot match the reference style, do not apply.



I am looking for a serious long-term creative partner who understands documentary storytelling and high-retention editing.

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Long-Term) — Indiana Real Estate Business

Lead Generation & Farming

• Contact research

• Pipeline tracking

• CRM management



Administrative Support



•
 management

• Appointment scheduling

• Data entry

• CRM maintenance



Your Profile



• Experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant (preferred)

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Reliable and proactive

• Comfortable working independently

• Looking for long-term collaboration



Tools & Systems

Why This Role Is a Great Opportunity

• Potential full-time role



I value clear communication, reliability, and a positive working relationship.

Describe your real estate experience

List tools you have used

Share your hourly rate

Provide examples of previous work (if available)



I look forward to building a long-term partnership.



Frank

title: AI VIDEO EXPERT [Need to be great at prompting]
description:
AI Video Creator — Realistic UGC-Style Video for App Ads

We run a portfolio of consumer apps and need someone who can generate hyper-realistic, casual UGC-style video using Sora, VEO, or Kling. The output needs to look like a real person filmed it on their phone — not like AI. If it looks AI-generated, it's useless to us.

Think: someone casually talking about an app, using a product in their kitchen, walking through a store, reacting to something on their phone. That level of realism is what we need.



The Work



Generate realistic AI video for app ads and organic TikTok based on briefs and scripts we provide

Stay obsessively up to date on the latest prompting techniques, model updates, and workflows for Sora, VEO, and Kling — these tools evolve weekly and we need someone who's on top of every update

Know which tool to use for which type of output and why

Iterate fast until the output passes as real casual footage





Must-Haves



Proven experience generating realistic human video with Sora, VEO, or Kling (not Runway, not Pika — we're specifically looking for these three)

You actively follow model updates, new techniques, and community discoveries for these tools — if we ask you what changed in the last update, you should know

Output that consistently passes as real phone-shot UGC, not polished AI demos

Weekend availability (Saturday + Sunday required)

Quick turnarounds


 communication via
 — must understand English

Reliable internet



Nice-to-Haves



Basic editing skills to trim and polish AI output

Experience creating content specifically for mobile app ads

Active in AI video communities 
/X, 
, Reddit) where new methods get shared first





Pay

Competitive monthly rate paid via Paypal. Long-term ongoing role.



Work hours:

You can work during phillipine time.



How to Apply

Applications that skip these steps get ignored.

Subject line must include the word RED.

Answer these questions in your message:



Which of the three tools (Sora, VEO, Kling) are you strongest with and why?

What's one specific prompting technique or workflow you use to make AI video look less like AI?

How do you stay current on updates and new methods for these tools?

Confirm you can work Saturdays and Sundays.



Send 3+ examples of realistic, casual-style AI video you generated. Direct links or files only. If we can immediately tell it's AI, you won't move forward.



What Happens Next

Qualified applicants get a paid test — a brief and a deadline. You get paid regardless of outcome.

Hiring asap.

title: Virtual Assistant / Operations Coordinator (Support Two Executives)| Part-Time (5–10 hrs/wk to start, with growth
description:
About the Role



We are seeking a highly capable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant / Operations Coordinator to support two executives across a portfolio of business ventures and personal and family responsibilities.



This is not a typical admin role.



You will act as a central operator—bringing structure, clarity, and execution across multiple moving parts. You will work closely with both principals to ensure priorities are managed, communication flows seamlessly, and nothing falls through the cracks.



If you are proactive, highly organised, and take ownership of outcomes—not just tasks—this role will suit you.



What Success Looks Like

• Calendars, travel, and family commitments run seamlessly

• Financial admin and reporting are accurate and up to date

• Communication across projects is clear, timely, and proactive

• We spend less time on coordination, and more time on high-value work

• You anticipate needs before being asked



Key Responsibilities

Executive & Administrative Support

• Manage complex calendars across two executives, including prioritisation

• Draft, edit, and manage communications 
s, memos, presentations)

• Coordinate meetings, agendas, and follow-ups

• Act as a key point of contact across stakeholders



Operations & Project Support

• Support multiple business initiatives (joint and individual)

• Track tasks, deadlines, and deliverables across projects

• Maintain organised systems for documents and workflows

• Improve processes and suggest efficiencies where possible



Financial Administration (No direct handling of funds)

• Track expenses, invoices, and recurring payments

• Assist with account reconciliation and reporting (Xero or similar)

• Maintain accurate financial records and dashboards

• Prepare information for review and approval



Personal & Lifestyle Support

• Travel planning (business and personal)

• Appointment scheduling

• General life admin to support a high-performing household



About You

You are not just organised—you are structured in how you think.



You bring:

• Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant or Executive Assistant (minimum 2–3 years)

• Strong written and verbal English communication

• High attention to detail and reliability

• Ability to manage multiple priorities across different stakeholders

• A proactive mindset—you solve problems before being asked

• Comfort working with ambiguity and bringing clarity

• High level of discretion and professionalism



Tools & Systems Experience

You are comfortable with (or quick to learn):

• Google Workspace / Microsoft Office

• Xero or similar accounting tools

• Project management tools (e.g. Notion, Asana, ClickUp)

• AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT) to improve efficiency



Working Arrangement

• Remote (must be within ±3 hours of AEST / GMT+10)

• Supporting two executives across shared and individual priorities



Compensation

• $12–18 USD/hour, depending on experience

• Opportunity for increased hours and rate based on performance

• Long-term role for the right candidate



Application Process

To apply, please follow instructions carefully:

1. Start your application with:

“I am the Awesome VA you need”

2. Include only the following:

a. Describe your previous Virtual Assistant / Executive Assistant experience

b. Provide two professional references (company +
—we will verify)

g. Your earliest start date



Interview Process

1. Application review

2. Video interview (we will assess communication, attention to detail, and work setup)

3. Paid trial period (1 week)



Final Note

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term.



If you take pride in your work, think ahead, and enjoy bringing order to complexity—we’d like to hear from you.

title: Video Editor - $1,500-2,000+/Month Performance Based Fast-Growing Supplement Brand
description:
We're hiring video editors for Blissta, a supplement brand  is scaling fast. We need editors who can take a script and turn it into a winning ad. Not tomorrow. Today.



**What You'll Do**



Take ad briefs from our creative team and bring them to life. Every script comes with timestamps, visual direction, voiceover, and pacing notes. Your job is to execute it exactly. Every detail matters. The smallest thing can be the difference between an ad that spends $50K and one that gets turned off.



Edit 2+ video ads per day. Source b-roll from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, stock sites. Find clips that match the script, not random footage. Use AI tools like HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Higgsfield, Flow AI to generate visuals, voiceovers, and animations.



Work directly with our Creative Director. They brief you. You produce. They review. You revise. Nothing goes live until it's perfect.



**Pay Structure**



Starting base: $1,500-2,000/month depending on experience. Performance bonuses kick in week 2. Top editors earn 2,000+ within 60 days based on output and ad performance. If your videos start spending in our ad account your pay goes up immediately. No ceiling. We promote fast. We pay fast.



**What You Need To Know**



How to source footage strategically from YouTube, Pexels, Storyblocks, TikTok, Instagram. How to match visuals to voiceover. Not random b-roll. Intentional clips that match the exact 
nt in the script. Pacing for direct response ads. Fast, punchy, no dead space. Text and caption placement that's readable and scroll-stopping. Basic color correction and audio cleanup. AI tools for video generation, avatar cloning, voiceover. Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut.



**What We Provide**



All scripts written for you with full timestamps and visual direction. AI tools for video generation and editing. Stock footage subscriptions. Fast feedback loops so you get better quickly. Long-term work if you're good. A creative team that actually knows what converts.



**Qualifications**



1+ year editing video ads. Not vlogs. Not YouTube videos. Ads. Experience with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve. Experience editing eCommerce or direct response ads. Experience with AI video tools is a huge plus.



**This Is NOT For You If**



You think creative means slow transitions and mood lighting. You can't take feedback. You miss deadlines. You think one video per day is enough. You need hand-holding. You're not hungry.



**This IS For You If**



You're fast and you're hungry. You want to get paid based on what you produce not how many hours you sit at your desk. You understand direct response. You want to work with a team that's scaling something real and you want to grow with it.



**Growth Potential**



Get priority on editing the highest budget ads. Higher pay as you prove yourself. Creative Director path to lead and manage other editors.



**How To Apply**



Send us:

1. Link to 2-3 direct response video ads you've edited. Not brand videos. Not vlogs. Ads.

2. A 2 sentence explanation of why each ad works.

3. Your availability and monthly rate.



Subject line: "Blissta Video Editor — I edit ads that convert"

title: Long-Form YouTube Video Editor (Finance Niche)
description:
We're hiring skilled long-form YouTube video editors for a fast-growing finance channel. You will receive raw footage and are expected to turn it into a high-retention, engaging long-form YouTube video by adding relevant B-roll, clean pacing, and strong storytelling edits.



What You'll Do:

- Work from raw footage and create a clean, engaging final edit

- Add relevant B-roll (news clips, charts, market screenshots, financial data visuals, supporting imagery)

- Add basic motion elements when needed (zoom/crop, simple titles, emphasis text)

- Clean up pacing, remove dead air, tighten delivery, and improve flow

- Ensure high-quality audio levels and overall polish



Required Skills:



- High-level English

- Fast communication

- Proven experience editing long-form YouTube videos

- Ability to independently choose and place relevant B-roll to support narration

Editing Style Example (Reference)



This is the style we want you to match:







Watch 2-3 videos on this channel. If you do not think you can edit to this standard, do not apply.

$40 USD per video delivered + bonuses for performance



We can provide up to 1 video per day

Expected turnaround time: 24-48 hours per video

To apply, you will be given a 1-minute intro editing trial. If your edit matches the style and quality we want, you'll be selected for ongoing work.



How to Apply (Important)



Start your application with the word: banana. This is to confirm you fully read the job post.



We are looking for long-term editors we can rely on. If you're fast, detail-oriented, and can make finance content engaging, this will be consistent work.

description:

Potential for more work if it’s a great fit
